I heard about this baby boy
Who comes to earth to bring us joy
And I just want to sing of this song to you
It goes like this
The fourth, the fifth
The minor fall, the major lift
With every breath I’m singing, ”Hallelujah”

Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah

A couple came to Bethlehem
Expecting child, they searched the inn
To find a place for your were coming soon
There was no room for them to stay
So in a manger filled with hay
God’s only son was born, oh Hallelujah

Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah

The shepherds left their flocks by night
To see this baby wrapped in light
A host of angels led them all to you
It was just as the angels
You’ll find him in a manger bed
And there you’ll meet your Savior, Hallelujah

Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah

A star shown bright out in the east
To bethlehem, the wise-man three
Came many miles a journey long for you
Into the place at which you were
Their frankincense, gold, and myrrh
They came to you and cried out, “Hallelujah”

Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah

I know you came to rescue me
This baby boy would grow to be
A man who’d one day die for me and you
Our sins will drive the nails in you
That rugged cross, was my cross, too
And every breath you drew was “Hallelujah”

Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah, Hallelujah
Hallelujah

1) LIGHT of the world YOU step down into darkness 
opened my eyes let me see... 
Beauty that made this heart to adore YOU, 
hope of a life spent with YOU. 

Here i am to worship, here i am to bow down, 
here i am to say that you are my GOD... 
YOU're altogether lovely, YOU're altogether worthy, 
YOU're altogether wonderful to me. 

2) KING of all days, YOU are so highly exalted, Glorious in Heaven above.. 
Humbly YOU came to the earth YOU created, all for love sake became poor. 

Here i am to worship, here i am to bow down, here i am to say that you are my GOD... 
YOU're Altogether lovely, YOU're altogether worthy, YOU're altogether wonderful to me. 

3) All this you went from Gathsamany, to the place of Skull.. 
All the insult and humiliation, YOU endured for me. 

Here i am to worship, here i am to bow down, here i am to say that YOU are my GOD... 
YOU're Altogether lovely, YOU're altogether worthy, YOU're altogether wonderful to me. 

4) I'll never know! how much it cost, to see my sins upon that cross. {2x}. 

Here i am to worship, here i am to bow down, here i am to say that YOU are my GOD... 
YOU're Altogether lovely, YOU're altogether worthy, YOU're altogether wonderful to me.{3x}.

Where you go, I'll go
Where you stay, I'll stay
When you move, I'll move
I will follow...

All your ways are good
All your ways are sure
I will trust in you alone
Higher than my sight
High above my life
I will trust in you alone (trust in you alone)

Where you go, I'll go
Where you stay, I'll stay
When you move, I'll move
I will follow you
Who you love, I'll love
How you serve I'll serve
If this life I lose, I will follow you, yeah
I will follow you, yeah

Light unto the world
Light unto my life
I will live for you alone
You're the one I seek
Knowing I will find
All I need in you alone, in you alone

Writer(s): Ruben Morgan, Chris Tomlin, Jason Ingram

The mystery of the cross I cannot comprehend,
The agonies of Calvary.
You, the Perfect Holy One, crushed Your Son,
Drank the bitter cup reserved for me.

Your blood has washed away my sin,
Jesus, thank You.
The Father's wrath completely satisfied,
Jesus, thank You.
Once Your enemy, now seated at Your table,
Jesus, thank You.

By Your perfect sacrifice I've been brought near,
Your enemy made Your friend.
Pouring out the riches of Your glorious grace,
Your mercy and your kindness know no end.

Your blood has washed away my sin,
Jesus, thank You.
The Father's wrath completely satisfied,
Jesus, thank You.
Once Your enemy, now seated at Your table,
Jesus, thank You.


Words and music by Pat Sczebel 
© 2003 Integrity’s Hosanna! Music (ASCAP)/Sovereign Grace Worship (ASCAP)

In Christ alone my hope is found
He is my light, my strength, my song
This Cornerstone, this solid ground
Firm through the fiercest drought and storm
What heights of love, what depths of peace
When fears are stilled, when strivings cease 
My Comforter, my All in All
Here in the love of Christ I stand

In Christ alone, who took on flesh
Fullness of God in helpless babe
This gift of love and righteousness
Scorned by the ones He came to save
'Till on that cross as Jesus died
The wrath of God was satisfied 
For every sin on Him was laid
Here in the death of Christ I live

There in the ground His body lay
Light of the world by darkness slain 
Then bursting forth in glorious Day
Up from the grave He rose again
And as He stands in victory
Sin's curse has lost it's grip on me
For I am His and He is mine
Bought with the precious blood of Christ

No guilt in life, no fear in death
This is the power of Christ in me
From life's first cry to final breath
Jesus commands my destiny
No power of hell, no scheme of man
Can ever pluck me from His hand
'Till He returns or calls me home
Here in the power of Christ I'll stand

Thank You Lord, You died for me
With Love, You gave Your life for me
Brought me from darkness into the world of light
Opened my eyes to see

Praise You Lord, Your love for me
Your blood of grace flows over me
Your tender mercy pours down from Calvary
Your love has set me so free

*
The precious Cross, by its pow'r I am set free
With my all, I worship at Your feet
Your saving grace, so secure in this promise of old
It's Your love unchanging for me

Thank You Lord, You died for me
With Love, You gave Your life for me
Brought me from darkness into the world of light
Opened my eyes to see

I’m forgiven because You were forsaken,
I’m accepted, You were condemned.
I am alive and well, Your spirit is within me,
Because You died and rose again.    *repeat
Amazing love, How can it be
That You, my King, should die for me?
Amazing love, I know it’s true.
It’s my joy to honor You,
In all I do, I honor You.
You are my King
You are my King
Jesus, You are my King
Jesus, You are my King

Amazing love, How can it be
That You, my King, should die for me?

Amazing love, I know it’s true.
It’s my joy to honor You,
In all I do, I honor You

1. O Lord my God, when I in awesome wonder
Consider all the worlds thy hands have made,
I see the stars, I hear the rolling thunder,
Thy power throughout the universe displayed:

2. And when I think that God, his Son not sparing,
Sent him to die, I scarce can take it in,
That on the cross, my burden gladly bearing,
He bled and died to take away my sin.

3. When Christ shall come with shout of acclamation
And take me home, what joy shall fill my heart!
Then *I shall bow in humble adoration,
And there proclaim, My God, how great thou art!

*
Then sings my soul, my Savior God, to thee:
How great thou art! How great thou art!
Then sings my soul, my Savior God, to thee:
How great thou art! How great thou art!

1. And can it be that I should gain 
  an interest in the Savior's blood! 
  Died he for me? who caused his pain! 
  For me? who him to death pursued?  
  Amazing love! How can it be 
  that thou, my God, shouldst die for me? 
  Amazing love! How can it be 
  that thou, my God, shouldst die for me? 

2. He left his Father's throne above 
  (so free, so infinite his grace!), 
  emptied himself of all but love, 
  and bled for Adam's helpless race. 
  'Tis mercy all, immense and free, 
  for O my God, it found out me! 
  'Tis mercy all, immense and free, 
  for O my God, it found out me! 

3. Long my imprisoned spirit lay, 
  fast bound in sin and nature's night; 
  thine eye diffused a quickening ray; 
  I woke, the dungeon flamed with light; 
  my chains fell off, my heart was free, 
  I rose, went forth, and followed thee. 
  My chains fell off, my heart was free, 
  I rose, went forth, and followed thee. 

4. No condemnation now I dread; 
  Jesus, and all in him, is mine; 
  alive in him, my living Head, 
  and clothed in righteousness divine, 
  bold I approach th' eternal throne, 
  and claim the crown, through Christ my own. 
  Bold I approach th' eternal throne, 
  and claim the crown, through Christ my own.

This is how we know
This is how we know what love is
Just one look at Your cross
And this is where we see
This is where we see how love works
For You surrendered Your all

And this is how we know
That You have loved us first
This is where we chose
To love You in return

For You so loved the world
That You gave Your only Son
Love amazing, so divine
We will love You in return

For this life that You give
For this death that You have died
Love amazing, so divine
We will love You in reply, Lord   (Repeat)

Our love will be loud
Our love will be strong
Our love shall be hands and feet
That serve You in this world

So let us stay true
And let it endure
That You will be glorified
And worshiped and adored

For You so loved the world
That You gave Your only Son
Love amazing, so divine
We will love You in return

For this life that You give
For this death that You have died
Love amazing, so divine
We will love You in reply, Lord

I hear the Savior say,
Thy strength indeed is small;
Child of weakness, watch and pray,
Find in Me thine all in all.

Jesus paid it all,
All to Him I owe;
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

Lord, now indeed I find
Thy pow’r, and Thine alone,
Can change the leper’s spots
and melt the heart of stone.

Jesus paid it all,
All to Him I owe;
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

And when before the throne I stand in Him complete,
"Jesus died my soul to save" my lips shall still repeat

Jesus paid it all,
All to Him I owe;
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.

Praise the one who paid my debt
And raised this life up from the dead

Praise the one who paid my debt
And raised this life up from the dead

Jesus paid it all,
All to Him I owe;
Sin had left a crimson stain,
He washed it white as snow.
He washed it white as snow.

1. Lord Jesus, I love You!  Lord, You died for me
You made me white as snow, Your heart's fairest jewel
You made me from darkness
In-to Your mar-velous light
You have changed my life
I'm forever Yours
You're forever mine!

2. Lord Jesus, I Love you! Lord You died for me
You're my life, You're my song, sweetest portion
You're my guide, my good shepherd,
My strong rock, my rest
You're my hope, my morning star
My Beloved, my all!
You're forever mine!

author: TBD
songtext:
1.  Long long a - go, You knew Your path of suffer - ing,
And You’d be raised on the bit - ter - est cross.
But glorious Lord, You never had a second thought;
For love You longed to be a Man for me.
My dearest Lord, so precious with joy You have come!
Forev’r a Man, so deep You comfort my heart,
Shatter my fears and my feeling of distance.
You yearn to be closest to me and live in me;
And now You live with joy for - e - ver in my heart!  

2. For - ev’r a Man, You make me know my true worth,
And I’m the seal, the dearest dove on Your heart!
Born as a Child, You make Hea-ven and Earth won - der,  
My-riads of an - gels behold, a -dore and praise!
My dearest Lord, so precious with joy You have come!
“Forev’r a Man”sealed Your love’s deep com - mit-ment.
Your fervent love comforts my soul, warms my heart.
May I for - ev’r enjoy Your pre - sence and love.
O Emman-uel for-ev’r You’re worthy of my heart!

author: TBD
songtext:
There's a place where mercy reigns and never dies
There's a place where streams of grace flow deep and wide
Where all the love I've ever found
Comes like a flood
Comes flowing down

[Chorus:]
At the cross
At the cross
I surrender my life
I'm in awe of You
I'm in awe of You
Where Your love ran red
And my sin washed white
I owe all to You
I owe all to You Jesus

There's a place where sin and shame are powerless
Where my heart has peace with God and forgiveness
Where all the love I've ever found
Comes like a flood
Comes flowing down

[Chorus]

Here my hope is found
Here on holy ground
Here I bow down
Here I bow down
Here arms open wide
Here You saved my life
Here I bow down
Here I bow... 

[Chorus]

author: TBD
songtext:
1. Rejoice! Rejoice! He's ri-sen 
  Overcome Satan and Death. He's ri-sen 
   Rejoice! Rejoice! He's ri-sen 
   Overcome Satan and Death, He sets me free 

2.  Rejoice! Rejoice!  He's ri-sen 
   Overcome Satan and Death, He's ri-sen 
   Rejoice! Rejoice! He's ri-sen 
   Overcome Satan and Death, He sets me free.

songname: The Love of Father, Son, Spirit (L05)
songtext:
1. You are the living God For-ever more
Of wonder and glory, “I am that I am”
Mid the Father, the Son, And the Holy Spirit
There’s interflow of love before time began

2. The Father and the son and the Spirit
Sweet and perfect in one, love boundless and deep.
Now I can partak such closest tie and love
Drink from the highest love, my heart rests in peace

author: TBD
songtext:
Lord, I come, I confess
Bowing here I find my rest
Without You I fall apart
You're the One that guides my heart

Lord, I need You, oh, I need You
Every hour I need You
My one defense, my righteousness
Oh God, how I need You

Where sin runs deep Your grace is more
Where grace is found is where You are
Where You are, Lord, I am free
Holiness is Christ in me

Lord, I need You, oh, I need You
Every hour I need You
My one defense, my righteousness
Oh God, how I need You

So teach my song to rise to You
When temptation comes my way
When I cannot stand I'll fall on You
Jesus, You're my hope and stay

Lord, I need You, oh, I need You
Every hour I need You
My one defense, my righteousness
Oh God, how I need You (x2)

我永希奇，我影響祢至深，
遠從亙古祢已想念我；
祢竟差遣祢懷愛子降世為人，
更在十架上捨棄祢愛子，
父，祢美麗的心，
如被萬箭刺透！
寶貴！榮耀！主在十架
呼喊「成了」！
幔子裂開，祢衝出來，
擁抱我入祢心，連連與我親嘴，
在我項上樂透、陶醉；
祢的愛夢榮耀地成就了！
啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦啦！
祢擺設豐筵，歌唱、跳舞；
因我狂喜歡呼，默然愛我；
環抱著我，因我雀躍！
我永希奇無限的祢，
因愛，至需要我！
渴想我與祢最親近，
永遠手牽手同活。

英文版：2004年1月18日　睡中醒時　溫哥華UBC Palace Garden

songname: 2-2 The Love of the Father, The Son And The Holy Spirit
author: Fish
songtext:
1. You are the living God Forevermore,

Of wonder and glory, “I am that I am.”

Mid the Father, the Son, And the Holy Spirit,

There’s interflow of love before time began.

 

2. The Father and the Son and the Spirit,

Sweet and perfect in one, love boundless and deep.

Now I can partake such closest tie and love,

Drink from the highest love, my heart rests in peace.

 

3. O God, the First, the Last, Great Your glory!

Yet You have thought of me since eternity.

How precious are Your thoughts, they outnumber the sand

Or the stars of heaven, all with love for me.

  

4. Through all eternity, You’re loving me,

Long that I’m joined to You, E’er in love abide.

Lord, You are my Beloved; Your heart , Your arm are mine,

 Sharing Your everything with me You desire.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Before time began was salvation grace

 Given to me in Christ Jesus.

From e’erlasting, He’ve thought of me.

Such love draws me, comforts my soul.

 

2. What length, breadth, height and depth, Lord, is Your love!

Gives me warmth, melts my heart each passing hour.

My soul adores, flows endless praise.

Your bands of love draws me to You.

songname: 2-8 He Came From Heaven To Earth
author: Fish
songtext:
1. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,

His name is Jesus,  

Dwelt among men with glory,

Full of grace, full of truth.

From heaven to earth He came to bring me

Back to the Father’s fold.

 

2. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,

Was in a manger born.

He bore all sorrows for me.

He walked to the cross for me.

God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth;

He gave Himself for me.

 

3. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,

To fight battles for me.

Destroyed the works of Satan,

He took away all my sins.

From heaven to earth He came to bring me

Out of death into life.

 

4. God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,

Forever He is man.

He is so kind and friendly.

What love and warmth He gives me!

God’s beloved Son came from heaven to earth,

His great love melts my heart.

songname: 2-12 The Love Song Of Heaven And Earth
author: Fish
songtext:
Gazes upon the earth, the hea’en above,

 Yet the earth has never cared.

But today, dear Lord, it’s so different now,

Through heaven and earth Your love is shown.

Looking up, run my tears, ‘cause You’ve once left there,

 And now again You are there.

Why should the heaven bow to kiss the earth?

Why should it shelter the earth?

If You were the clouds up high,

I could only be a small grass down on earth.

Yet the clouds turn to rain, showering down,

To nourish my whole life.

Never dared I to dream of the things above,

But today I am seated in heaven with You. ‚

ÄòTis too good to be true, yet this message from You,

Is the best that’s ever come true.

author: Fish
songtext:
From heaven, Lord, You came.

It makes me so amazed.

You were mocked and despised,

yet Your love was still the same.

E’en Your brothers’ sneers could not quench Your love,

Men’s indifference showed more Your love of endurance.

The world forsook You, and cried, “Away with Him!”

You were steadfast, walked to Calvary!

Wondrous Cross! Wondrous Cross!

Vast forgiveness and bountiful grace flowing from the cross!

Love as flashes of fire, as the flame of God!

Your fervent love to men makes me ever amazed, adore!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord Jesus,You once gave Yourself for me.

Once You have poured out Your life freely for me;

Walked to Place of a Glogotha, and were hung on the tree,

Blood and water came out, all for me.

 

2. Lord Jesus, You’ve suffered so much for me.

For me You have bore those stripes in Your body;

You are God, yet for me, were despised by the world.

That I might gain You. Thank You, Lord

 

3. O Lord Jesus, whom my soul loves,

Now and ever. You abide in my heart;

Precious indwelling, union forever!

Nothing can keep You and me apart.

 

4. Storms and waves may come to me all the way,

 But all these just urge me to You draw near You;

Lord, I’m glad to abide in Your bosom of love,

 And respond to You with all my life.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord Jesus, You’ve given Yourself for me.

You have poured out Your life freely for me;

Walked to Place of a Skull, and were hung on the tree,

Blood and water came out, all for me.

 

2. Lord Jesus, You’ve suffered so much for me.

You have borne those lashes in Your body;

You are God, yet for me, were despised by the world.

Thank You, Lord, You’ve done these ‘cause of me.

 

3. O Lord Jesus, whom my soul loves,

You are now abiding in my heart;

Precious indwelling, union forever!

Nothing can keep You and me apart.

 

4. Storms and waves may come to me all the way,

 But all these just urge me to You draw nigh;

Lord, I’m glad to abide in Your bosom of love,

 And respond to You with all my life.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Not that I loved the Lord Jesus,

But He has loved me first,

Dying for me on Calvary,

Bearing all my sins for me.

 

2. My Lord’s love is as strong as death,

Fervent as burning flame.

Waters, great waters cannot quench;

 All treasures cannot replace.

songname: 2-22 The Loving Course Of Jesus -The Crucifixion
author: Fish
songtext:
1. “Away with Him!”‚ cried men on earth.

They drove the Lord out of the gate.

Wounded He bore the cross for me,

To Golgotha bled all the way.

 

2. Though He was rich; He became poor

Even His clothes cast lots they took.

All thro’ His life, weary and sore,

In manger born, died on the cross.

 

3. His hands were nailed; His feet were pierced,

Hung on the tree, dreadfully cursed.

His blood flowed down, bones could be counted,

Tongue cleaved to jaws, heart melted like wax.

 

4. “Fountain of Life‚” said, “I’m thirsty.”

From lake of fire, He did save me.

God’s beloved Son, by God forsaken.

Lonely, He tasted death for me.

 

5. His face was marred, and He was crushed.

Bloody and scarred, within and without.

The precious veil is rent for me.

A living way to God He leads me.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. How I thank You, dear Lord!

You came to die for me.

You shed Your blood; Hands, feet were pierced,

To save a wretch like me.

 

2. Moved deeply by this love,

Eyes brimmed with tears I bow.

O Son of God, how can it be

That You should die for my sins!

 

3. Saved from eternal death,

Set free from pow’r of sin,

Led into the marvelous light,

E’er in God’s kingdom I live.

songname: 2-28 It’s You Who Have Loved Me, My Lord!
author: Fish
songtext:
1. For the great salvation, You gave Your all;

 And for comforting man, humble You were.

For preaching the good news, on earth You trod;

It’s You who have loved me, my Lord!

 

Chorus:

It’s You who have loved me, my Lord!

Wipe my sorrows, sadness off.

Mourning to dancing, despair to great hope.

It’s You who have loved me, my Lord!

 

2. For my heart to get healed, stripes caused You pain;

And for giving me peace, You were chasten;

For ransoming my soul, died on the cross.

It’s You who have loved me, my Lord!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. O the cross of Golgotha

Tells the love of my Saviour, how deep!

Down from heaven full of wealth and glory,

You did come, shed Your blood for me.

Foxes have holes, even birds of the air have nests, 

Yet You had no place to lay Your head.

 

2. O the cross of Golgotha

Tells the love of my Saviour, how rich!

Suffered all the shame and scoffs so sorely,

Gave Yourself, bore the stripes for me.

The crown of thorns, the wounded hands and feet and side-

I am set free by Your sacrifice!

 

3. Think and think - O Lord, Your love undying!

Ne’er its depth can I realize!

Gazing upon the cross - Your arms are open wide,

May I come and consecrate my life.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Behold! The sun gave not its light.

The earth was darkened and shook;

He left His Father’s face and died,

For me lowly and vile.

 

2. I view the cross from every side,

His blood, His wounds I meet:

His head, His face, His hands, His back,

His side, His trunk, His feet.

 

3. For me to understand His love,

He let His side be pierced;

Flowed blood and water proving this:

His heart ‘s wounded for me!

 

4. Hear, on the cross the Lord’s first words: ‚

"Father! Forgive them! Forgive!”

He died to pardon countless sins;

He died that we might live.

 

5. To the corners of the earth

I’ll tell The wondrous love of the cross.

Begone, the world’s riches and pride! 

I lose them to gain Christ!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. The grace of my Lord Jesus Christ -

O what a costly grace!

The Son of God once became poor for me.

 In manger born, He was humble and toiled,

Died on the cross, for me suffered all loss,

Of flesh and blood, bore the cruel punishment,

God’s beloved Son was by God forsaken.

O what a costly grace, that makes me rich in faith,

My Lord, I love You, adore You,

Such love deserves my heart to gain.

 

2. The grace of my Lord, Jesus Christ

Immense, glorious and rich!

Surpasses human thoughts God’s vast ocean of love!

Captives of sin now with the Lord shall reign;

Men of distress now are children of God;

Once enemies now become His darling;

One with the Lord, never sep’rate again

O what a costly grace! What a beautiful heart!

My Lord, I love You, embrace You,

Enjoy and trust. My heart ‘s amazed!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. May I oft meditate:

What a place You put me in Your heart!

How You long to be united with me!

 What a price You have paid for this!

 

2. May I oft meditate:

“I am willing,” You said through Your blood.

Betrothed me with Your blood ever to You,

How You desire and long for me.

 

3. May I oft meditate:

How You long to abide in my heart,

Be one spirit with me, ever draw near.

You will to share all things with me.

 

4. Never forget Your grace!

May I think of Your love every day;

Shakes the earth, thrills my heart, Lord, Your great love!

May my heart ever love You only!

songname: 2-42 Deep Deep Love Of The Lord
author: Fish
songtext:
Lord Jesus, Your love ‘s so deep;

I can never measure all.

For my sake, You suffered,

Gave Yourself and bore my sins.

Rugged road, You hold my hand;

In troubles, You relieve me.

I should rest inside Your love,

Let Your love fill me deeply.

I know You did everything for me.

I should love You more than anything.

In north wind or south wind,

I’ll still sing and praise You.

Only You can fill my heart.

May the whole world taste Your grace.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord, Your love ‘s so true! 

For me You suffered all sneers and sores.

For me You bore the cross! 

For me You abide in my heart.

For me You ever live!

I know for sure this love is true, 

Not just brief mercy You give.

 

2. Lord, Your love ‘s so deep, 

Gives me abundant life of glory, 

Like a charming melody. Thru’ days, thru’ months, thru’ all the years, 

Brings forth enchanting hymns. 

When I reach home, may I repeat 

ev’ry song of love at Your feet.

author: Fish
songtext:
Is there any love as Lord Your love,

More lasting than the universe?

Through all the ages Your thoughts for me

 Outnumber the sand of the sea.

Hark, the voice of my Beloved!

Behold, from heaven He came.

To find me He came from heaven.

And took the form of a slave.

Why for me a homeless life You lived,

Acquaint’d with pain and grief?

I retrace in Bethany

Before the tomb You did weep.

God’s love is the same to the end.

Behold the perfect Son of Man,

Without a trace of changing shadow,

He’s gentle and mild even now.

His gaze is tender and charming,

Draws me from wandering.

It melts my heart, it melts my heart,

It melts my unyielding heart.

Why You had a marred and grieved form,

No place to lay Your head?

I retrace on the cruel cross

Your love that overcame death.

I have to give thanks, I am amazed,

Such love in this world I’ve obtained.

To me steadfast and unchanging,

It’s You who’s ever-loving.

Your love that great waters cannot quench,

Deserves all my heart to gain.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Precious blood was shed for me!

Cleansed me of my guilt and sin,

Cleared away thick clouds and mist;

Your love and blood, the best balm,

Heal the wounds deep in my heart.

 

2. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Precious blood was shed for me!

Washed me whiter than the snow,

Even brighter than crystal.

The Father opens His arms,

Welcomes me back to His fold.

 

3. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Precious blood was shed for me!

Cast away my fears and doubts,

Bestow me sufficient faith.

Boldly to the Holiest,

Father’s bosom is my place.

 

4. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Precious veil is rent for me!

Let me see the Father’s face,

Enjoy His full acceptance;

Ever live in cloudless morn,

Abide in the Holy Place.

 

5. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Your wounds are my hiding place,

Rest and shelter of my heart,

Shield me from tempest and charge.

No more shadows and dark clouds,

I rejoice in Your embrace.

 

6. Rock of Ages cleft for me!

Let me hide e’er in Your heart;

Fully taste fruit of the cross,

Daily drink of Your great love;

No more shadows, no more doubt,

My heart is drawn after You.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Behold, the veil is rent!  

The Father runs to me;

He embraces and kisses me;

In His bosom so sweet.

 

Chorus :

Deeper than the sea,

His love e’er will be!

In His sea of grace I live,

Drink from salvation fount.

 

2. The lost son has returned,

The Father lays a feast.

Dancing, rejoicing, He’s merry.

In His delight I live.

 

3. The lost son has returned.

There’s no more wandering;

The Father’s love captures my heart.

I mind only His things.

 

4. The Cross removed hindrance,

 Opened the gate of grace;

The Father’s love from heaven pours,

Fills up my thirsty heart.

 

5. The Cross removed hindrance;

His wondrous grace I taste;

Living water from heaven flows,

Becomes a spring in me.

 

6. Behold, the veil is rent!

I see the Father’s face;

Talking with Him so glad and free,

How warm and sweet to me.

 

7. Behold, the veil is rent!

I see His boundless love;

The Holiest ‘s my dwelling place.

I stay before His face.

 

8. Behold, the veil is rent!

Christ’s at the Father’s right;

I see His glory, face unveiled,

Am changed to like Him be.

 

9. Behold, the veil is rent!

In heaven sit with Him,

I share the Father’s face of love,

Enjoy cloudless mornings.

songname: 2-60 ”It Is Finished‚” And “Sit At My Right”
author: Fish
songtext:
1. “Sit at My right!” - the  Father’s glad response to

“It is finished!”

He has given the Lord all authority,

Highly exalt’d Him,

And given Him the name which is above all names.

 O how precious, forever I’m joined to the Lord!

 

2. “It is finished!” - the Lord’s great proclamation!

Full victory!

His victory now becomes my victory.

By Him I am rich.

The Lord is pleased to share with me all His glory,

I’ll sit with Him on His throne till eternity.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Christ arose from the dead!

The stone was rolled away;

O what a joyous, glorious news,

The angels did proclaim,

He is not here, He is not here,

For He is risen, For He is risen, as He said.?

 

2. Christ arose from the dead!

And death was swallowed up!

Satan who had the pow’r of death

Forever was destroyed.

Christ holds the key of death,

Set free those who fear death;

O Death, where is your sting?

O Hades, where ‘s your victory?

 

3. Christ arose from the dead!

And death was swallowed up!

He brought life and immortality

To light so gloriously.

 He fills my life with hope,

With meaning and bounty.

It is so sweet - the risen Lord

Is now living with me!

author: Fish
songtext:
At dawn He’s risen! Bright morn light shines,

Drives off the world’s dark night.

 The glorious Lord parts from the grave,

Wipes all sorrows away.

The world has hope hence forth! (Hurray!)

 And I can boast to the end! (Hurray!)

The risen Lord has conquered death,

1. A glorious hope He gives. (Wonderful!)

2. Takes all my fears a - way. (Wonderful!)

What a boastful hope He gives! (Hallelujah!)

author: Fish
songtext:
1. He’s risen! He’s risen!

Jesus has conquered death!

My Lord is risen,

He has conquered Satan.

My Lord Jesus has saved me;

My Saviour has set me free.

 

Chorus:

So let us sing! Hallelujah!

Hallelujah! Hallelujah!

 

2.He’s ascended on high!

He’s ascended to heav’n!

He’s given glory,

That is above all things.

He’s living up there for me;

He’s holding authority.

 

3. He’s ascended on high!

He’s ascended to heav’n!

He’s thinking of me;

He is praying for me.

Preparing a home for me,

How He longs to receive me!

 

4. He’s coming! He’s coming!

He promised to come soon.

To meet me in the clouds,

Ever to be with Him.

He has kept rewards for me,

And prepared a wedding feast!

 

5. Dear Lord of my heart!

May You come soon, come soon!

Then I’ll stay by Your side,

O how happy and sweet!

In the City stroll with You,

By the River walk with You.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. It’s so precious! I have the risen Lord.

Throughout my life, daily He walks with me.

He had passed through the darkest night!

He'd overcome Satan and death!

He holds my hand and walks with me through life,

Leads me through storms and fires -

And I shout, “Vict’ry!”

 

2. The risen Lord is my fountain of joy.

This joy no one can snatch away from me.

He fills my heart with faith and hope.

I joy in Him, while onward go.

 He holds my hand and walks with me through life,

 Leads me towards the peak -

And I shout, “Vict’ry!”

 

3. I’d tasted death, but now I am living.

I’d conquered death, and I’ll live forever.

I’ve the keys of Hades and Death.

My hand hold all authority.

Fear not, My love, I am with you always,

To the end of the age.

Oh, let us rejoice!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My Beloved longs that I

behold Him now in glory.

He who lives, once was dead,

is alive forevermore.

He’s ascend’d to the Father’s right hand,

Given glory and authority.

May my eyes fix on Him,

let His glory transform me.

 

2. He longs that I see Him

seated at the Father’s right.

How glorious! He appears

before the Father for me.

The Father loves me as He loves Him.

He is pleased with me; I am His dear.

May my eyes fix above -

Changes not the Father’s love!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Love, boundless love! To the Lord ever I’m joined!

One in spirit, ever closest to Him.

Entered into the untold riches of Christ.

Exalt Him high; He is my all, my life.

 

2. The glorious Lord in my heart ever abides.

‘Living union’, I am His. He is mine.

Never alone, live in sweetness He and I.

As close as one, split not we for a while!

 

3. Deeper union than the branches with the vine.

Deepest union, beyond head-body tie.

One in spirit, no hindrance as we draw nigh.

He ‘nd I as one, what precious bliss of mine!

 

4. He’s now in me to be my glorious life.

Day ‘nd night supplies my every need inside.

He is my drive, nourishes, transforms and guides.

Through me His light, glory and love to shine.

songname: 2-80 The Son Of Man United With Me
author: Fish
songtext:
1. You came as Son of Man, triumphed for me,

 Conquering ev’rything, all to inherit.

You share the promise of the Spirit with me.

One spirit I’m with You, my life You have been.


2. You became Son of Man, to give me warmth.

 As flashes came Your love, from high You brought forth.

How gloriously You lived, God’s heart to men unsealed,

Taught me to live by You, reveal Your glory.

 

3. Son of God, Son of Man, fore’er You’ll be!

You’re my elder Brother; You are my Beloved.

One in spirit with You, a living union,

I am drawn after You by Your love so deep.

 

4. Now I’m never alone, ev’r knit to You.

When I think of myself, rightly think of You.

To fight battles with You, earth’s journey walk with You,

Face everything with You, my heart rests in You.

 

5. At times it’s so lonely, cheerless it seems,

Yet You dwell in my heart, give a melody.

As in heaven I feel, enjoy Your love and warmth.

My heart’s can leap and shine; flames of love grow strong.

 

 6. Though now I live on earth, my heart ‘s on high.

 Always I think of You living in glory.

Each other we possess, closer than all on earth.

Falling in love with You - my greatest treasure.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. O Father on Your right there’s the Son of Man!

He’s my Brother, my Beloved, my best Friend.

I even can become fellow-heir with Christ!

Who can comprehend my riches and joy?

 

2. Union with Him is my greatest blessing;

Freed from the sphere and yoke of slavery!

Before God, I am a new creature in Christ,

In His glory and light ever abide.

 

3. Union with Him is my greatest blessing;

I now belong to my Beloved alone.

All thru’ this life, I enjoy His company;

In love live with Him through eternity.

author: Fish
songtext:
Glorious, glorious -

The hour I first believed.

I have been joined to the Lord,

In one spirit.

Wonderful! wonderful!

Now I am in Christ.

It’s no longer I who live,

But a new man.

The precious Lord lives in me.

Co-heir with Him of all things,

I partake His glory,

Father’s love and the Spirit.

Love that’s true, love that’s true,

What a love it is!

I want You to be my Lord,

Live in love with You eternally.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. If anyone is in Christ,

He is a new creation.

Old things have passed away;

All things have become new.

 

2. I am no longer the thorn,

But lily of the valley.

I belong to my Beloved;

His desire is toward me.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Now that I have been crucified with Christ,

It is no longer I who live,

But it’s Jesus Christ who lives in me,

Jesus Christ who lives in me.

The life which I now live in the flesh,

I live by faith in the Son of God,

Who loved me and gave Himself for me,

Loved me and gave Himself for me.

 

2. How great is the riches of the glory

of the Mystery of “Christ in me”.

My Lord Jesus Christ is mighty in me.

He’s greater than all in the world.

Christ dwells in my heart through faith,

I am rooted and grounded in love.

I abide in Him and thus bear much fruit.

Living water flows from my heart.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Though I had not followed Jesus in Galilee,

Yet now His presence is closer to me.

It’s for my good that He goes to the Father,

For when He goes, the Helper’s sent to me.

Forever more, the Spirit will dwell in my heart.

In storms or waves, His company is with me.

He is my gain, my portion, my fountain of strength!

With love for love I’ll yield myself to Him.

 

2. Though I had not leaned on the bosom of my Lord,

Yet in my heart forever He will stay.

I do believe He loves me with the highest love.

He loves me just as the Father loves Him!

Oh such great love is the foundation of my faith;

Oh such great love is the drive all thru’ my life;

Oh such great love draws me away from worldly cares;

Oh such great love binds my heart to His as one!

 

3. Though I had not offered perfume for His death,

Yet my spirit and body are all His.

Now I am a holy and living sacrifice,

I’ll pour myself at the feet of my Lord.

Devoted to His glorious plan I’ll strive for Him.

His way I’ll go forward with no returning

With the best gift, I’ll seek the favour of my Love.

I’ll watch and wait to see my Beloved in the clouds!

 

4. Though I had not followed Jesus in Galilee,

Yet now I have a glorious, boastful hope.

Soon comes the Day, that I’ll meet the Lord in the clouds,

And thus I shall be with Him forever.

He’ll share with me His everlasting glory.

 He’ll sit with me on His throne of sovereignty.

He’ll walk with me in the Holy City of Life

He’ll live with me in love through all eternity.

songname: 2-98 In Glory The Son Of Man
author: Fish
songtext:
In glory the Son of Man

Always thinks of me.

For me, He was born,

and Died, and rose to heaven.

One day He’ll come back,

To take me to be with Him ever.

He loves me and longs for me.

His love, His pow’r is mine.

I’ll lean on His bosom, Take Him to be my all.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lo, the winter is past; the rain is gone

Trials ended, flowers bloom on the earth.

The time of the singing of birds has come.

The turtledove’s voice has been heard!

The fig tree has ripened its figs;

Vines in blossom give forth fragrance.

O My darling, beautiful one,

Arise! arise! and come along,

And come along!

 

2. On Mountains of Bether I wait for You

Sojourn on earth, I long for Your return.

I lay aside all things to see Your face.

Apart from You, I’ve no desire.

Steadfast I’ll be, love You only.

Wait for You on Mountain “Cloven”*.

Lord, I am Yours, and You are mine.

O Lord Jesus, I long for You! I

 long for You! I

 long for You!

(*Bether means cleaving or separation.)

author: Fish
songtext:
I know for sure where I will go one day -

A place where carols ring, where no sorrows remain,

A city of glitt’ring gold, walls of lovable jasper.

I know for sure where I will go one day -

A home of scenic land, where love fills every place,

With my Lord ever to dwell, His countless riches to taste.

This is the home that You prepare for me -

A hea’enly home above I’ll see.

Now and fore’er, my heart is glad and sure.

Joined to Your heart, we shall never part!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My Lord Jesus was resurrected,

He has overcome Satan.

Seated at the right of the Father,

He is the victorious King!

He is the Lord of lords, He is the King of kings,

The ever-living God! (Hallelujah!)

He’s enthroned eternally, And reigns forevermore,

He is the glorious King! (Hallelujah!)

 

2. Soon He’ll come back, The church to receive,

To His home in heaven so fair.

In the City, New Jerusalem,

Taste the wedding feast of the Lamb,

What a joy that overflows! No tears and no sorrows,

To enter sweet eternity! (Hallelujah!)

Reign in the Millennium, Over the universe,

Fore’er the Lord and we! (Hallelujah!)

 

3. Brothers, sisters, how happy we are,

In heaven with God e’er to live!

Partake His joy, His glory and bliss,

Live with Him the eternal spring!

It’s so bright beyond compare,

God’s kingdom is righteous,

Unshakeable, full of peace. (Hallelujah!)

Let us join to sing and praise

The ever-living God

To Him be all glory! (Hallelujah!)

author: Fish
songtext:
1. In the clouds comes the time we meet

Face to face our dear Lord we see.

Parted many years, now at last we meet,

Starts the sweet eternity.

 

2. Hold my hand to the heav’nly home,

Then the Father gladly we see.

Take a City walk, of the past we talk.

What a sweet eternity!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My heav’nly home, full of warmth and restful peace,

Pearls as the gates, wall of jasper, street of gold,

Precious stones laid, and the Lamb as lamp shining.

There’s no longer night; River of life flows forever.

See His face, taste His love, My heart overflows with joy.

With all the saints I’ll gladly sing and reign together!

 

2. ‘The First’, ‘the Last’ - my Lord is ever-living.

‘Alpha’, ‘Omega’ - He will bring me to glory;

The good Shepherd’ll guide me to the River of Life.

In rest eternal, we shall taste the sweet fruit of life.

In the bright morning light, know His love in depth and height,

Hear echoes of love ringing in the City of Life.

 

3. Come, O Lord! Come, O Lord!

Take the church into the clouds.

Dark is the night,

May Your light shine forth upon all land.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. And I behold new heaven, new earth

And I behold new heaven, new earth

Ah! I behold new Jerusalem,

Out of heav’n coming down.

Things of sorrows have passed away,

Have all passed away.

No more death on earth thus shall be found,

No more mourning on earth shall remain.

Christ our Lord will forever reign,

New heaven, new earth He brings!

Ah! Jesus Christ,

You’re the City’s glorious light;

You are the King of kings.

 

2. O King of kings, O King of kings,

You are worthy to reign.

For great is Your salvation pow’r!

Your loving-kindness is vast.

E’en a sinner You change to a prince;

In the desert, You make rivers.

What a glory - Love of the cross

Set all the captives free!

Ah! Jesus Christ,

Heaven and earth moved by Your grace,

Give forth their songs of praise.

 

3. O our dear King, O our dear Lord,

You are the King of peace.

As the mountain is Your justice,

Your love is like the deep sea.

All the nations will be blessed by You.

All peoples will yield their hearts to You.

To us You are ever-loving.

In wonder angels sing!

Ah‚! Jesus Christ,

*May You come soon, May You come soon,

We long to see You reign. *(Repeat)

songname: 2-116 The Will Of The Father And The Son
author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord, Your body is given for me.

The veil is rent, was torn in two.

Now there is no more hindrance of sin.

 With my face unveiled I see Your glory.

Hallelujah! How You long that I am Yours!

You desire to draw near to me,

And I treasure to draw near to You.

“Close to Him!” How precious ‘tis to me!

My good part and my eternal bliss.

When I rise up early ev’ry day.

I long to draw near to Him.

 

2. Father, how broad and loving is Your heart!

You gave Your Son to ransom me,

That I may fore’er know and follow You.

 And you bring me into Your household, too.

Hallelujah! The Father’s house has appeared!

‘Tis my family, and your family.

Let’s together love and care for it.

Father, help us to love even more,

To accomplish Your beautiful will,

Ever to be rooted in this house.

Heart to heart we journey home.

author: Fish
songtext:
In God’s household lived many saints.

How excellent they are!

United in love and honesty,

Never split. (never split)

For the love of Christ has melted me,

That I know what love should be,

Lost in brothers’ and sisters’

Loving streams. (loving streams)

Let’s join hands to walk the journey,

Building up ourselves in love;

Stand up in unity, satisfy Him.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. This is my Father’s world.

See the wonder of His works!

All show His love and tender care,

Give grace and joy to man.

He made birds of fine tunes,

“Alarm-cocks” that crow at dawn;

He made insects play the symphony,

He clothes the night with peace.

 

2. He made the sun that shines,

The moon that glows at night;

He made clouds to shower and cleanse,

And as sun-shade so nice.

He made mountains and seas,

For my delight in the scenes,

Lovely and thoughtful are His designs,

Showing His love tender and real.

 

3. He made the galaxies,

To widen my eyesight,

My Father’s greatness I may perceive,

That draws my heart to worship.

Your love is high and deep,

Thoughts of love as sand at sea.

I praise Your love; I admire Your grace;

Echoes of love I give.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. The Lord’s Father - my Father,

The Lord’s God - my God as well;

Now I am my Father’s dear child.

His bosom - my resting place.

Manifold afflictions I’ve passed,

But His plan must be the best.

He has planned all my life’s journey -

 “Through suff’rings enter glory”.

 

2. Father, my time ‘s in Your hand.

Everything ‘s good in its time.

I don’t fear the long dark valley.

Dawn of hope will come at last.

Your thoughts plentiful and precious.

Rainbow ‘s bright when rain is past.

Your way is higher than man’s way,

Your love is higher than sky.

 

3. I am well loved as Your Son,

Father, I’m in Your best care.

You knows well all my afflictions,

You have numbered all my hair.

Oft’ You uphold me on my right,

Not be shaken will my feet;

My heart ‘s glad and free of worries,

Finishes the course in peace.

 

4. On earth, Father, You’re with me;

Before You I boast and leap.

With a heart sincere and set free,

Talk closely with You, how sweet.

Comes the day the Lord receives me,

See Your face my joy is full.

Fellow-heir with Christ in heaven,

Sharing all eternally.

songname: 2-130 My Father Who Loves Me Ever
author: Fish
songtext:
1. My Father who loves me ever,

Holds me with His loving hand;

With His highest love that knows no end,

Paves my journey of glory.

In afflictions, through dark valley,

My heart can rejoice in You;

“Through suff’ring to glory” - t’is my way,

Too beautiful is my gain.

 

2. My Father who loves me ever,

You have listened to my pray’rs;

All Your promises will never fail,

And Your time must be the best.

Mid the trials You open a way,

Perfect me thro’ sufferings;

What You’ve planned for Your beloved ones

Must surpass what I can think

author: Fish
songtext:
1. In my Father’s bosom I’m loved,

I am His delightful hymn.

All my hair with care is numbered,

He treasures me more than birds.

Precious thoughts He does bear for me

More than the sands of the sea.

My sitting down or rising up,

Ever in His loving sight.

 

2. From young to old, He fosters me.

All my life is in His hand.

Fellow-heir with Christ now I am,

Enjoy His abundant plan.

Though on earth there are vales of tears,

He’s the God of all comfort.

He holds my hand through the journey,

Till in heaven I see Him.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. This is My Father’s world!

I can be free of worries.

Dancing, singing as a bird of cheer,

praising His watching over me.

This is My Father’s world,

I can sing Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!

My name has been set upon His heart,

I am the apple of His eye.

 

2. My Lord has conquered Satan,

He has overcome the world.

He is risen, taken to heaven,

As head over all things for me.

Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!

He has won the victory!

Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!

My Brother holds authority!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Jesus gives me living water,

He’s my dew and my joy.

He is the bread of life that fills my hunger;

Jesus is my rock, my fortress,

my refuge and my shield.

He is my inner strength, my ready Helper.

He’s my life, transforms me

from glory to glory.

He’s my glorious boastful hope of this last age.

 

Chorus:

Jesus is the Bright Morning Star,

the henna in the yard;

I am His, He is mine, I love Him ever.

 

2. Jesus is my Mediator,

who pleads and intercedes.

He’s my High Priest who can sympathize and bless;

Jesus is my King who subdues

my heart’s adversaries.

He is the King of kings. His foes will perish.

 All will be put under Him;

 All knees’ll bow to Him.

The universe will be filled with His vict’ry.

songname: 2-138 The Lord Is Fair And Good
author: Fish
songtext:
1. He’s so fair! He’s so good!

My abundant love feast!

He’s so fair! He’s so good!

More than tongue or pen can tell.

Close to Him, close to Him;

I foretaste heavenly joy.

Close to Him, close to Him;

Is my portion on earth.

 

2. He’s so fair! He’s so good!

My Friend faithful and true;

He’s so fair! He’s so good!

My Beloved, sweet and dear.

He’s with me, He’s with me,

Nothing on earth shall I fear!

He’s with me, He’s with me,

My heart’s gladdened and cheered.

 

3. He’s so fair! He’s so good!

Spurs me on all my life.

He’s so fair! He’s so good!

Gives me joy and comfort.

For the Lord, for the Lord,

I will bravely go forth.

For the Lord, for the Lord,

I will strive through my course.

songname: 2-142 Christ Is The Centre Of My Life
author: Fish
songtext:
1. No longer I, but Jesus Christ,

Becomes the centre of my life;

Ever I’m His, forever He is mine.

Christ is the Lover of my heart.

 

2. Not on myself, look upon Christ,

 He’s my heart’s vision of glory.

The Lord draws me fore’er to follow Him.

I belong to Him, O how sweet

author: Fish
songtext:
In You I’ve confidence.

No more in haste I run.

My perfect Providence,

Your grace is sufficient.

You are waiting to bless.

In You dwells all the fullness.

Gladly shall I return

To Your bosom and rest.

Drink from the salvation fount,

Enjoy Your bountiful blessings.

And lift my head above the foes,

Rejoice beneath Your wings.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Such love as Yours,

makes me know the true worth in me;

Such love as Yours,

makes me see the beauty of all things.

Life is full of meaning, worth well to live.

Then I understand why there’s eternity,

And I know why,

Your desire is to abide in me.

 

2. Such love as Yours,

gives me rest in days dim or bright;

Such love as Yours,

makes me live in tender morning light,

Gives me hope to run my course with delight.

Thorns and swords I conquer overwhelmingly.

Lord, in Your love,

there is never fear but sweetness only.

 

3. Such love as Yours,

teaches me what beauty really means;

Such love as Yours,

teaches me to praise and to give thanks.

Turns me into a poet, a morning bird;

Melts me into a river,

vast and flood’d with love,

Ever flowing,

toward the earth’s end, till eternity.

 

4. Such love as Yours,

abounds in deeds, warmth and thoughts so deep;

Such love as Yours,

keeps my spirit alive, ever-fresh,

Cheering me to climb up the highest peak,

Blowing me to sail towards the boundless sea,

Ever love You,

follow You to the corners of the world.

 

5. Such love as Yours,

makes me long for the heavenly home;

Such love as Yours,

makes me long to see Your glorious face;

O Lord Jesus, may You come, may You come!

In the Holy City of light and love we live,

Sharing with You,

endless songs and mornings eternally.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My darling, my dove, I long for you;

 Let Me hear your voice, see your face,

For your voice is sweet, and your face is lovely.

Let’s meet in the clefts of the rock.

My darling, my dove, I’ll share with you your joy and tears.

Walk with you heavenward, E’er be your company,

Until we meet in eternity.

 

2. My Saviour, my Beloved, I long to draw near!

For Your love to me is high and deep!

Down from heaven You came, paid the ransom for me.

Such great love forever constrains me!

My Saviour, my Beloved, I am wholly drawn after You.

None in heaven I love, none on earth I desire,

None else I will seek besides You.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord, Your ever precious purpose

Is for me to dwell in You.

Lord, You suffered and gave Your life;

That we may meet face to face.

Through disciplines, trials, enemies,

You urge me to come to You.

With bands of love, cords of kindness,

You have bound me close to You.

 

2. You give me the Holy Spirit

That I’m ever joined to You.

In close friendship we’re heart to heart,

Forever in company.

You do love me; I do love You;

 Nothing can make us apart,

One day You’ll come to take me up,

To share Your endless glory.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My darling among the maidens

Is like a lily among the thorns.

My darling, beautiful one,

May you arise and come along.

Let me hear your voice,

Let me see your face.

For your voice is sweet, your voice is sweet,

And lovely is your face.

My sister, My bride,

A glance of your eyes steals My heart.

My sister, My bride,

A strand of your necklace steals My heart.

My darling is charming as Tirzah,

Lovely as Jerusalem,

Awesome as an army with banners.

You are all together lovely!

 

2. My Beloved among the young men,

‘s like an apple tree in the forest.

His banner over me is love,

His love has captured my heart.

My Beloved is dazzling and ruddy,

Outstanding among ten thousand.

I am my beloved’s, My beloved is mine,

And His desire is for me.

Set me as a seal,

Set me as a seal upon Your heart.

Set me as a seal,

Set me as a seal upon Your arm.

Until the cool of the day

When the shadows flee away,

Make haste, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,

On the mountains of Spices.

songname: 2-158 The Lord’s Personal Love To Me
author: Fish
songtext:
1. The Lord’s personal love to me,

Is pure, undying to the end.

Waters, great waters cannot quench it;

Time, even years, can’t make it fade.

Withstanding various trials and tests,

It never fails my heart to gain.

The Lord’s personal love to me,

Encourages me all my life.

When I’m despaired, His love comforts me,

Great and steadfast above all things.

Rich and abundant, tender and soft,

I will boast of forevermore.

 

2. The Lord’s personal love to me,

Is sweet and warm and full of hope,

Shares in my life all sorrows and joy,

Gives me courage and gives me faith,

Fills my heart like a living spring,

His bosom may I ever stay!

The Lord’s personal love to me,

Makes the angels admire, amaze.

Deeper than the sea, high’r than the sky,

His love paves all my paths of life.

Grace upon grace, ‘tis uncountable,

Beyond compare, no else to find.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Full acceptance, love forever!

Ocean of love, O how vast!

Deeply I taste, fully I drink

God’s great love with no ending!

 

2. Full acceptance, love forever!

All my doubts and fears are gone.

In Your love there’s sweetness only.

With You I can smile and leap.

 

3. Full acceptance, love forever!

I can rejoice all my life.

South wind, north wind, spring or winter,

We embrace, love each other.

 

4. Full acceptance, love forever!

How beautiful is Your heart!

Who can sep’rate me from Your love?

We’re united, heart to heart!

 

5. Full acceptance, love forever!

My heart is drawn after You.

Nothing can be compared to You,

Can I not desire You?

 

6. Full acceptance, love forever!

My soul is healed and compelled.

I lift my head, my heart’s set free!

With You gladly onward go.

  

7. Full acceptance, love forever!

Your yoke is easy and light.

You walk with me, hold my hand tight.

We leap over depths and heights.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!

What a sweet and precious blessing!

Who is so close to me but You?

You’re my present help in time of need.

 

Chorus:

Presence day and night, how warm and sweet!

 With You by my side I’m not alone.

Presence day and night, joined heart to heart!

Living with You, I taste heav’nly bliss.

    

2. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!

You are my support and comfort.

With You, I’ll not fear nor worry.

You are always glad to stay with me.

    

3. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!

I count on You, pour out my heart.

You are my Beloved and best Friend,

Carry me ahead, and hold my hand.

    

4. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!

Lord, Your love has gone through all tests!

Your friendship is warm and precious.

All the universe ‘s beyond compare.

    

5. Twenty-four hours’ presence with me!

You have filled my life with Your grace;

Having lived with You for these years,

Can I live in heaven without You?

author: Fish
songtext:
1. O God, Thy name how sweet and how fragrant!

In Thy bosom, how peaceful and pleasant!

In love with Thee, at night I still can sing.

In love with Thee, I fear not long dark night.

    

2. With Thy presence, alone yet not lonely.

With Thy presence, I own heavenly bliss.

Walking with Thee, the dark vale seems so bright.

Nearness to Thee, my heart’s and Thine delight.

    

3. Thou in my life, what warmth and goodness give!

Thou in my life, make me fervently live.

Eternally, with Thee there’s endless spring.

Eternally, with Thee there’s love so sweet.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. My past journey You’ve cared continually.

My course ahead, Lord, You will surely lead.

In storms or waves, You are the First, the Last.

 Oh my Beloved, You’ll uphold all my paths.

    

2. My God Your name is “I am who I am”,

The First, the Last, with all love and fullness.

You can supply my needs and my desires.

Now and ever, in You I’m satisfied

author: Fish
songtext:
My Elder Brother, My dear Friend is the Lord,

Our friendship endures, our affection grows deep;

He paved my past journey with His grace and His love,

For my days ahead, I walked by my Beloved.

Though my future is yet to be known,

The Lord has promised to be with me always;

He has promised to be my Shepherd,

To guide me each step, until I see His face.

The path of the just is as the shining light,

That shines more and more till the perfect day.

songname: 2-174 All The Way He’s With Me
author: Fish
songtext:
1. All the journey when I retrace,

thankful tears oft fill my eyes;

 Once was lonely, vile and worthless,

now I shine forth as the light.

Ne’ er forget the Lord’s appearing,

and His love as honey sweet,

Drawing me from worldly follies,

all my heart belongs to Him.

Drawing me from worldly follies,

all my heart belongs to Him.

    

2. All my life in trials abounding,

suffer wounds so long and deep.

Yet His love spurs and comforts me;

by His words my wounds are healed.

With His presence I am sustained,

my soul wings to higher place!

Strength upon strength as I walk on,

smile across all storms and waves!

Strength upon strength as I walk on,

smile across all storms and waves!

    

3. O dear Lord, can I not love You?

May my life be love response!

Pour out all my heart before You,

share my daily life with You.

Think of You, call upon Your name,

closely follow all the way.

Talk and smile to You every hour,

deeper friendship grows each day.

Talk and smile to You every hour,

deeper friendship grows each day.

songname: 2-176 The Lord and I In Love Forever
author: Fish
songtext:
My darling, My bride, My dove,

You are altogether beautiful.

Your form is lovely and your voice is sweet.

My darling, there’s no blemish in you.

You have ravished My heart with a glance of your eyes,

And your eyes have overcome Me.

You are like a lily growing mid the thorns.

O the fairest one among all,

You are the dearest of My heart.

    

2. My Beloved and my precious Lord,

Your love moves my heart so deeply.

It’s unique, greater than the sky and the sea.

All things cannot be compared to it.

May You set me as a seal on Your heart

Set me as a seal on Your arm.

My Beloved, may You return and take me up

To the home above You’ve prepared.

Ever to dwell in love with You.

My Beloved, may You come soon!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. O My darling, you are so beautiful!

There is no blemish in you!

May you come along with Me, My bride,

Come with Me from Lebanon.

May you come with Me from Lebanon;

From the dens of lions, and mountains of leopards;

Journey down from the peak. My sister, My bride,

you’ve made My heart beat fast

With a glance of your eyes;

A strand of your necklace steals My heart.

    

2. O My darling, My sister, My bride,

How beautiful is your love!

How much better is your love than wine;

And the fragrance of your oils

Is better than all kinds of spices.

My sister, My bride, you are a garden locked,

A rock garden locked, a spring sealed up.

You are a garden spring, a well of fresh water,

And streams flowing from Lebanon.

    

3. Awake, north wind, and come, wind of the south,

Blow into my garden!

Make my garden breathe out fragrance;

May my Beloved come and eat

All kinds of choice fruits in His garden.

author: Fish
songtext:
Grow old along with me,

The best is yet to be!

The last of life, For which the first was made.

 Our times are in His hand

Who saith, “A whole I planned”;

Youth shows but half; trust God;

see all, nor be afraid!

Grow old along with me,

The best is yet to be!

The last of life, for which the first was made.

Our times are in His hand

Who saith, “A whole I planned”;

Youth shows but half; trust God;

See all, nor be afraid!

Youth shows but half; trust God;

see all, nor be afraid!

Your favour is for life;

 Lord, I want to see it all!

The light that shines more and more

Unto the perfect day.

Unto the perfect day.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. All that I encounter throughout my life

Are united to You and Your will;

You and I belong to each other,

Facing everything together.

For Your will though I suffer hardship,

Persecutions, slanders and sneers,

Yet my heart can rejoice in all these,

For Your grace abounds through my journey.

Your presence, the warmth in God’s family

Moves me deeply and gives me joy and rest;

Your fervent love compels my heart,

Floods and flames to pass I’m steadfast!

    

2. We’ ve fought many fierce battles, yet I find

Your wondrous salvation every time;

By You, I lift my head and boast,

By faith press on toward the goal!

Lord, You do appreciate my love for You,

On this suff’ring yet glorious journey;

Then one day, You’ll come to receive me

Into Your endless joy and glory!

Your presence, the warmth in God’s family

Moves me deeply and gives me joy and rest;

Your fervent love compels my heart,

Put on the armour, I march on!

    

3. May all that I decide throughout my life,

Be united to You and Your will;

You and I deeply love each other,

Walking this life journey together.

songname: 2-192 I Can Face All With Jesus
author: Fish
songtext:
I can face the world with Jesus.

I can face today and tomorrow

With the risen Lord.

Through the storms, thro’ life’s billows,

Thro’ the night, long, dark valley,

Across the sea, o’er the mountains,

He leads me to glory.

He’ll walk with me thro’ all life’s journey

 Till I see His face.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Lord, when the church has come up to the Red Sea,

Way blocked ahead, the foes are getting near.

Deep in my heart, I still have the surpassing peace,

Knowing Your wonderful salvation ‘s near!

Lord, I give thanks for You are watching from above,

Ever holding authority for the church.

I can rejoice, seeing You perform miracles!

The evidence of Your love to us You show.

    

2. Lord, I treasure the years of copious journey,

Walking with You through floods, flames and valleys.

Your words of grace have nourished, enlivened my soul,

Make my faith strong and boastful to the end.

Your loving hand leads me to go through each distress.

My tears and laughters in Your sight are precious.

Lord, I give thanks for Your favour and tenderness,

Your presence with me is my sweetest sweetness.

    

3. When I think of the task ahead yet to be done,

Lord, You know well the path I have to tread.

Thousands of souls, hopeless and lost, are waiting,

May Your great love make me firmly go forth.

Lord, hold my hand tight as I run my course ahead,

In lands of joy, o’er mountains and swift rivers.

Bright days or dark, our hearts are drawn closely as one,

Rejoice till the day I see You face to face.

    

4. Lord, I am Yours, and You desire and long for me.

O my Beloved, let’s go out to the field.

Early let’s rise, go out to the vineyard and see

If the vine’s budd’d, its blossoms are open.

There I will give, there I will give my love to You.

See, at our gates are pleasant fruits, new and old.

O my Beloved, I have laid up all these for You.

Lord, may Your heart be satisfied in this household.

    

(Refrain)

 O Lord, do come, take me to be with You always.

Hand in hand we shall sing and dance forevermore.

songname: 2-198 Walk With The Lord The Path Of Suffering And Glory
author: Fish
songtext:
1. My Lord came down to earth for me,

Was in a manger born,

Unique, yet He was rejected,

Repelled and misunderstood.

Lonely He walked on, Fully followed God.

No place even to lay His head,

He’s opposed, defamed and scorned.

    

2. What a brilliant light my Lord shone

In His short earthly span.

The Father’s glory to man showed,

He is fairer than all men.

Acquainted with grief, Tempted in all things.

He can comfort and understand.

He wipes away all my tears.

    

3. Oh how precious my Lord chose me

For this task of glory!

His gift and calling not revoked,

He will keep me to the end.

Thru’ the dark valley, My heart shall not fear.

His faithfulness reaches to the skies.

And He keeps truth forever.

    

4. He has opened His heart to me -

He has revealed His will.

Though the foes gather to storm me,

My warm dwelling place is He.

I have a sure goal; For life I’ll press on.

Faithful to the heav’nly vision,

Follow gladly, no retreat!

    

5. What a joy to know my Lord’s will,

And to stay close to Him.

The way may be full of hardship,

Yet I live abundantly!

Is there the ‘Red Sea’, mud land or high hills?

He is the First, He is the Last;

He will accomplish His will.

    

6. Deepest pain He suffered for me,

Can I be with no wounds?

Follow to the end steadfastly,

Look down on all trials and sneers.

Suff’rings brief and light, Gladly bear for Him.

Let these make up sweet memories,

And eternal glory.

    

7. South wind, north wind; spring or winter;

I’ll live with my Lord still.

World’s bitterness, joy in God’s house -

All are love designs of His.

Sufferings will pass, Glory yet will last!

He makes all things work together,

Moulds me into His likeness.

author: Fish
songtext:
My Lord sought me, My Lord bought me

To be His beloved,

I’m on His heart, I’m on His arm,

So warm and protected.

I’m a jewel in His heart,

Ever to Him united,

Shining before the Father,

I am His delight.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Christ’s fervent love does melt my heart,

Make me amazed, adore!

The thought of it thrills all my soul,

Compels me to the end.

    

2. Such flaming love is my drive -

I live my live for you!

Rightly I am beside myself

And strive to save the world.

    

3. A self-denying life-

For the flaming love of Christ!

songname: SL1-2 The adorable and Captivation Risen Lord
author: Fish
songtext:
The Adorable and Captivating Risen Lord
Let s re - joice! He is ri - sen!
O - ver - came Sa - tan and death;
He swallowed up death, gives us glow-ing hope.
The glo - ri - ous Lord rose from the dead,
For-e - ver we should re - joice!

2. My Jesus tomb is empty,
He has overcome death,
Manifesting life incorruptible.
In life s journey, He walks with me,
He is my fountain of joy.

3. The risen Lord lives with me,
He clothes me with joy and smile.
He’s my strength and drive, He s my sweet portion.
He lives in my heart; He s my Beloved;
With Him, life is warm and sweet.

songname: SL1-4 The Lord Personal Love to Me
author: Fish
songtext:
1. His person - al love to me,
Your person - al love to me,
Pure, undy - ing to the end.
Great floods can - not quench it;
Time, ev’n years, can’t make it fade,
Withstands var-ious tri - als and tests;
It never fails my heart to gain.
2. His personal love to me,
Is my drive through all my life.
When I’m despaired, His love comforts me;
His love overcomes all things.
Rich, colorful, tender and soft,
I’ll boast of His love forever.

songname: SL1-6 The Love of the Beloved
author: Fish
songtext:
1. O’ my Beloved — so glo - ri - ous,
He is a - bove all things.
His love to me is high and deep
Through - out e - ter - ni - ty.
To gain my heart He be-came flesh.
For ma - ny years He suffered much.
He did love me and die for me.
He de - sires me.

2. O’ my Beloved, His fervent love
Is like flashes of fire.
Many waters cannot quench love.
His love is stronger than death.
All things may change, His love’s the same.
His love to me is ever fresh.
He lives with me from dawn to dusk.
He desires me.

3. O’ my Beloved loves me deeply.
He suffered all for me.
My eyes of faith capture His heart,
And make His heart beat faster.
I’m His darling, His dearest one.
He shouts for joy, dances for me,
Quiets for me; His heart is filled.
He desires me.

4. O’ my Beloved — His tender love
Satisfies all my heart.
He is the myrrh between my breasts
That heals the wounds of my heart.
His love gives me joy, rest and peace,
He draws me. I overcome the world.
He gives me faith to pass through all.
I desire Him!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. By my love I enter Canaan from wilderness
By my Brother I con-quer giants and fortress
Fatih as my shield rid the devil's missiles,
By my Lord I over-come the world, sing and smile.

2. He holds my hand through all dangers, waters and flames,
His rod and staff guide and protect me all the way,
The Lord loves me, and I love Him dearly!
How warm and sweet He embraces me all my life

3. His love and grace pave my journey of sores and cheers;
For His love I follow firmly with thankful tears.
How I long to see my Lord with my eyes!
How I long to abide with my Lord forever!

songname: SL1-10 The Lamb Who was Slain
author: Fish
songtext:
You are worthy to take the scroll,
And to open its seals; for you were slain,
And have redeemed us to God by your blood out of every tribe
and tongue and people and nation, and have make us kings
And priests to our God; and we shall reign on the earth.

Then I looked, and I heard the voice of many angels
Around the throne, th' living creatures
And the elders; and the number
Of them was thousand of thou-sand, saying 
With a loud voice, Worthy is the Lamb

Who was slain to receive power
Riches, wisdom, might, honour, glory and blessing

And every created thing which is in heaven, on the earth
And under the earth an in the sea, and all in them,
I heard saying, Blessing and honour and glory and pow'r
To Him who sits on the throne
And to the Lamb for-e-ver!

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Tis the most pleasant home, the de-sire of God and mane
Full of fragrance of ove, songs of joy every-where
A home of warmth and grace, ov'rflowing rivers of joy
The peacefule dwelling place of God an dman for-e-ver
Home sweet, sweet home
The hearts of God and man become one in this sweet home

2. Through all eternity, in God's plan, home is the core
The Father, the Son and the Spirt giave all for this
The Lord came to the earth and was nailed upon the corss.
God's heart was pierced. He gav His all fo rme
Home sweet, sweet home!
This is my vision, my goal, my dream and my rest.

3. Through all eternity, the myst'ry of all ages
Has been revealed to me, I've found the greatest treasure.
Now, I have understood Myst'ry of Universe
I have the goal of life, this my hope and tis my aim
Home, sweet, sweet home!
The hearts of God and man are fully satisfied

4. Through all eternity, and throughout the universe
Only in this home God and man can be at rest
God's house is bountiful - rivers of joy, fount of life,
This household reveals God's glory and beauty
Home sweet, sweet home!
God's infinite fullness overflows from this household.

author: Fish
Fish
Fish
songtext:
F 4/4 In the Cross

On the cross, my Lord conquered all the foes;
On the cross, all my sins He washed a- way.
O’ Mov- ing, __ life-yield - ing love!
Its depth and height in - fi - nite!
By the cross, God’s love tome is displayed.

2. On the cross, “It is finished!” He declared;
On the cross, the wall of sin He shattered.
O’ Salvation of glory!
I’ve obtained glorious freedom!
By the cross, God and man embrace as one.

3. Inthe cross, I can see a ray of hope;
In the cross, my soul’s comforted and healed.
O’ Tender light of the cross!
What encouragement it gives!
By the cross, my life has a glorious change.

4. On the cross, His offing is once for all;
On the cross, His blood washed me white as snow.
O’ Perfected for all time!
Full acceptance, endless love!
By the cross, God and man are ever close.

5. In the cross, He cast away my load of sin;
In the cross, He freed me from the yoke of law.
O’ How warm and sweet to live
In His vast ocean of love!

By the cross, God’s love on me is outpoured.

6. In the cross, His love kindles my whole life.
In the cross, His love gives me faith and might.
O’ Wondrous love of the cross —
Shall be my drive and my rest!
By the cross, I shout for joy and vict’ry.

songname: SL1-18 Rejoice! The Lord is Risen!
author: Fish
songtext:
D 3/4 Rejoice! The Lord is Risen!

Re - joice! Re - joice!  He is ri - sen!
Over-came Satan and death, He is ri - sen!
Re-joice! Re - joice! He is ri - sen!
Over-came Satan and death, He sets me free!

songname: SL1-19 At the Sea of Tiberias
author: Fish
songtext:
At the Sea of Tiberias

At the Sea of Ti-be-ri - as,
The ri- sen Lord appeared to me;
He prepared a _ bar-be-cue on the shore,
With fish and bread and His tender love. _

O Lord! You know that I love You
Though I have fai - lures and weakness.
May You strengthen me by the Spirit,
To fol - low and love You to the end.

songname: SL1-20 One Day the Lord Will Come
author: Fish
songtext:
1. One day the Lord will come,
To take me to the clouds;
That day He’ll wipe away my tears,
I'll dance and sing aloud.

Chorus:
O’ Lord, I love You. My heart longs for You.
Gladly waiting for that day,
I'll see Your glorious face.

2. One day the Lord will come,
To transform my body.
To be like His form of glory,
How wonderful and free!

3. One day the Lord will come,
Tl marvel and rejoice.
To see my Lord’s glorious face,
Shall be my spring of joy.

4. One day the Lord will come,
Take me to Abba’s home.
I'll see His wondrous love design,
For me the new abode.

5. One day the Lord will come,
Gone all sorrows and tears!
Tl drink from the river of joy,
Enthralled in His love.

6. One day the Lord will come,
Crowns, rewards to present.
We'll reign fore’er, His government
Will increase with no end.

7. One day the Lord will come,
He is my hope so blest,
There'll be new heaven and new earth,
In which dwells righteousness.

author: Fish
songtext:
His Gaze of Love

Can a wo-man forget her nursing child?
E-ven these may for-get, T wont forget you.
Be-hold, ‘I’ve inscribed you on My palms.
Your adorable countenance’s always before Me.

2. The mountains shall depart, the hills be removed;
But My kindness shall not depart from you.
All things may change. My love is the same.
My covenant of love is forever sure.

3. My child, Iw will never leave you, never forsake you.
Till the end of the age, I’m always with you.
I love you as the Father loves Me.
Day and night I watch over you, fix My eyes on you.

author: Fish
songtext:
The Perfect Salvation

1. My sins more than I can number,
His blood washed me white as snow,
And He has purged my conscience.
Now I am free before God.

Precious blood redeemed me.
What can I pay Him back?
Let me enjoy Your great love,
Your perfect salvation.

2. Twas away from the Father.
By His blood, He brought me back.
The veil was torn for me fore’er.
I can see the Father’s face.
I dwell in the Holy Place,
My home’s God’s tabernacle.
God’s perfect love casts out my fear.
And I cry, “Lord, may You come!”
 3. My Lord’s ascended to heaven
For me, appears before God.
In heaven I sit with Him,
Enjoy the Father’s delight.
Closest to the Father,
Closest to the Father,
Tam His dear child forever.
It’s so sweet to cry, “Abba!”

4. The bitter way You walked for me.
You said, “Finished!” on the cross.
You laid down Your life for me.
Now I can embrace You.

Lord, let me see Your heart,
Move me to love You more.
T offer my life for You,
Forever I will love You.

author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
This is True Love

God sent His on-ly Son in - to the world
That we might live through Him, through Him.
The love of God is shown.
His love is shown to all.

Not that we who loved God
But it’s God who loved us,

Sent His on-ly Son to be a sacri-fice
To save us from sin.
This is true love.

(I John 4:9-10)

author: Violin
songtext:
SL1-26 The Long Expected Embrace

When I lifted my head for Your face I wished to see,
I met Your gaze on me which was from e-ter-ni -ty.
I could not realize when You be- gan
To put me on Your heart!

WhenI considered that was just our first encounter,
Instead it was Your long expect-ed embrace with me.
I was surprised with joy whenI met You the first time,
Yet, all a- long, You’ve been deeply loving me.
As time goes by, I love You more and more.
Since long a- go You’ve desired me, thought of me.
Ah Ah ! This sweet love that surpasses time and space
Is a true ex-peri- ence of You and me.

F 4/4

1. In the middle of the lamp - stands
One like the Son of Man,
Clothed a robe reaching to the feet,
Gird’don His chest a gold-en band.

His head and hair were white like wool,
As white as snow.
His eyes were like a flame of fire,
His eyes were like a flame of fire.

2. His feet were like fine brass, as if refined in a furnace;

His voice was like sound of waters;
His right hand held seven stars.
Out of His mouth came a sharp sword,
A sharp two-edged sword.

His countenance was like the sun
Shining in its strength, in its strength.

3. When! saw Him, I fell at His feet
Like a dead man, like a dead man.
He placed His right hand on me saying,
“Don’t be afraid. Don’t be afraid.
I am the First, Lam the Last. I was dead and behold,
Lam alive forevermore. I am alive forevermore.

4. And I have, and I have the keys of Hades and of death.”
O Death, where is your victory? Where is your victory?
O Death, © Death, where is your sting?
Where is your sting?
Hallelujah! Hallelujah!
The glorious Lord has overcome death!

(Ref: Rev.1:13-18; | Cor.15:55)

author: Fish
songtext:
I strive e- ven a-mong dai - _ ly chores,
In quietness live for You;
I strive e- ven life’s busy and tight,
Lord, I still walk with You.

I strive despite the world’s corrupt course,
I'm san-ti-fied to You.
I strive on! O’ Lord, for You I live.

2. I strive even in doubts and worries;
Let You comfort my heart.
I strive mid the storms of temptation,
Lord, keep my heart sincere.
I strive in the days of affliction,
My love to You I give.
I strive on! 0’ Lord, for You I live.

3. 0° Lord, I know that You love me,
I have captured Your heart!
How precious Your favor, tender love,
That’s why I’m striving still!
Forget not You chose, commissioned me;
I’m glad to know Your will.
I strive on! 0’ Lord, for You I live.

songname: SL1-32 What a Friendship the Lord with Me
author: Wan Sheng Chow
songtext:
My dear Lord, day and night You're by my side;
All the years You've car - ried me,
Through floods and fires,
In the north wind and dark night,
On the path of ea-sy life,

Walk in love hand in hand You and I.
Your call-ing and Your will can I deny?
I will run after You all my life.
Thank You that You have revealed
Such a love so high and deep!

Lord, Your love on the cross compels me.

When I look on to the fields,
Har-vest plentiful and white;
Lord, re-vive my heart a-new!

Can it be that I should let You grieve in zeal?
‘Tis my plea, my Lord, for You 'll live!
