Loving You, T’ll press on towards the goal!

songname: SL1-34 The Lord in the Flesh and Blood
author: Fish
songtext:
In the silent night sky, stars twinkling bright,
In the town of Bethlehem my Savior’s born.
Ly - ing in a manger, wrapped in cloths,
My Lord came in the flesh and_ blood.

Chorus:

The Lord loved me and became flesh,
Fully understands my troubles.
He be-came a Man. He feels what I feel.
He’s full of com-passion and _ love.

2. He once lived on the earth. He once was tired.
He once was thirsty, hungry, sad and angry.
His heart was once pierced through. He once did weep.
He once suffered all pains for me.

songname: SL1-35 For Love, Lord, You Came
songtext:
D 4/4 For Love, Lord, You Came

For love, You came from heaven to the earth.
You were born in a manger.
You be - came the son_of a carpenter.
But for love, Lord, You came.

2. For love, You endured various temptations.
You had no place to lay Your head.
When You were weary, You thought of my needs.
And for love, Lord, You came.

3. For love, You’re willing to bear all the shame.
You were spat on the face.
You bore all the stripes, wore the crown of ‘thorns.
But for love, Lord, You came.

4. For love, You were willing to bé nailed.
You bore my sins on the cross.
For me, You were forsaken by God.
But for love, Lord, You came.

5. For love, You’ve overcome all pains and trials.
Lord, I want to follow You,
May I love the world with You all my life.
For Your love I’ll go forward.

author: Fish
songtext:
He loved me and died for me!
Consider this grace
That changes all my life,
Gives me hope and joy!

Lord, Your great and ten-der love
Heals the wounds of men;
Yet, You were oft despised,
Acquainted with grief.

Chorus:

On the cross You bled and died,
To ransom my soul.
Your heart was wounded for me!
There’s a living way
To the Father’s fold!
Think’ng of Your love, I’m moved to tears.

2. You were forsaken for me
Both by God and men;
Lonely, You prayed that night
In great agony!
Silently, You bore the cross,
Walked to Calvary,
Bled all the way, and were lifted on the tree!

songname: SL1-39 You Gave Yourself for Me
author: Fish
songtext:
F 6/4 You Gave Yourself for Me

Lord, You loved me and died for me!
You drank the bitter cup
On the cruel cross, You shed your blood
Brought me to be your own

My heart gives thanks, I yearn to praise,
Praise You for-ever more.
Till all perish, I'll love You still.
Be-long to You only.

author: Fish
songtext:
E 3/4, 4/4 SL1-40 The Dawn has Come


The dark night is gone and the dawn has come!
The Lord left His tomb, leaving the linen wrapping.
He thought of Pe-ter and the disciples.

He saw their sorrow, their dis-appointment.
He saw all their tears and their wounds.


He'll take a-way shadows.
He'll wipe a- way all tears.
He'll destroy all darkness, despair.
He'll co-ver them with — glad- ness.
He will give them the glorious hope.
And now they know His love — stronger than death,
Always the same, never sep’rate from His love.


The Lord will be with them al - ways
Un - til the end of the age,
Un- til the end of the age.

author: Fish
songtext:
F 3/4, 4/4 I Love Your Appearing

O’ Lord, I love Your ap - pear -_ ing.
You'll meet me face to face!
In love for years, no words can tell
Such deep love and friendship.

Seeing Your face, I will love You evenmore,
The clouds’ll be bright-er than be - fore.
And to a-bide with You and know Your wonder,
‘Tis bliss be-yond com - pare!

2. O’ Lord, I love Your appearing.
The world I lay aside!
This world, its lusts will pass away,
The toil in God e’er abides.
Not far from me I see the coming glory,
You'l praise me at the stage of Christ!
How You cherish all that I have done for You!
All these You bear in mind.

3. O' Lord, I love Your appearing.
I don’t mind suffering!
The glory’s of exceeding weight.
You have laid up crowns for me!
You hold my hand through floods and flames and trials.
Soon You'll bring me into glory!
Then I will sit with You fore’er on Your throne.
With You hold sovereignty.

songname: SL1-44 Hope in the Grace of the Lord’s Coming
author: Fish
songtext:
1. You should rest your hope fully on
The grace of the Lord’s com - ing,
And heed to the prophetic word,
Heed to the prophetic word,
Till the day dawns, the morn - star
Ris - es in your heart.
You are drawn by the Lord’s coming,
Long-ing for future glory.


2. I don’t mind the things which are seen,
But the things which are not seen.
For the things seen are but temporal,
Those not seen are eternal.
Light affliction for a while,
Works for us lasting glory
That’s of far more exceeding weight.
What a bliss to be with Him!

3. The rich grace of the Lord’s coming
Surpasses all human dreams.
I shall be taken to the clouds,
And be face to face with Him.
My body will be transformed
To be like His of glory,
He'll bring me to the Father’s home,
Stroll in the holy city.

4. When I see His face of glory,
And realize His love so deep,
Tl be drawn by His majesty,
Changed into marvelous glory!
Love response flows from my heart,
Like a spring that ever swells.
God’s household is full of sweetness.
We'll dwell in “the worlds of love”!


5. Thrilling prize-giving at Christ’s stage!
The toil in Him not in vain.
Giving water to little ones,
A reward from Him I'll gain.
He’ll remember all my days,
All sweet memories display.
So precious He appreciates me.
He cherishes my love.

6. The beauty of the Father’s home
Excels all men’s fantasies;
Gates of pearl and walls of jasper,
Gems as base and gold as street,
The river and trees of life,
The Lamb as the city’s light!
The city’s filled with warmth and love,
Full of life and glory bright.

7. The crowns He gives me won't perish.
I will be more glorious.
Government and peace of the Lord
Shall forevermore increase.
I'll sit with Him on the throne,
Reign with Him eternally.
Soon the glorious “worlds of love”
Will spread o’er the universe.

songname: SL1-47 Enjoy the Fruits of the Cross and Deeply Enter into His Beautiful Heart of Love
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Enjoy the Fruits of the Cross and Deeply Enter into His Beautiful Heart of Love


In the Lord and the cross, I rejoice and glory!
For He gave Him-self for me,
Bought me to Him by His blood.
This strongest love changes my life,
Con - strains me, gives me faith.
O’ this greatest, most precious deed
Is strong - er than the rock,
As stable as the throne!
The fruits of the cross, sweeter than honey,
Give me faith, peace and vic - tory.
O’ how pre-cious! Thick clouds and mist van-ished,
No more hindrance or shadow!
In His presence I rejoice!
Now I can bathe in His warm glorious light,
It’s so sweet and life-giving! O’what a joy
To enter deep in- to His fair-est heart,
Drink fully of my Beloved’s love,
En - joy His all-know - ing friend - ship.
QO’ what a joy to live with Him!
Makes me feel His af- fect - ion
Fill - ing the whole universe,
Fill - ing heaven and the earth.

Who knows in this dark and suffering world,
There is heaven on the — earth!
Who knows in this dark and suffering world
Is hid- den the deepest love between He and I!
It makes me feel His af - — fect- ion
Fill - ing the whole u- ni -~ verse,
Filling heaven and the earth.

21-6-2005 awoke in sleep and
3-7-2005 awoke after sleep
UBC Palace Vancouver

songname: SL1-50 Enthralled in His Matchless Love
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Enthralled in His Matchless Love

Enthralled in His matchless love,
Like liv- ing in a _ love dream!
His love fair - er than flowers,

0’ His love fills the whole u- ni- verse,
Heav’n and the earth,

UBC Palace Vancouver

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Let's Celebrate

Let us dance and ce - le - _ brate.
For we are God’s dear child - ren!
And ~~ we are the lo- vers of the Lord!
The je-wels of the Spi - rit!
Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!

31-5-2003 awakened on bed

songname: SL1-52 The Deepest Affection! The Highest Father's Love!
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The Deepest Affection! The Highest Father's Love!

In this whole universe,
There’s no deep-er affection,
No higher fa-ther’s love,
Your bosom is my sweet rest.
Father, dai-ly You long to see my face,
Love to hear my sweet voice call-ing to You;
Daily You long to kiss me with kiss - es,
Embrace me.
Ab -. ba, Your matchless plan,
Full of wisdom and love!

As Your child, born of You,
I’m care free and drawn by You.

You desire to bring me to great glo- ry,
Sit with You on the throne, to in- he- rit all;
You ev’n prepare a wedding feast for Your Son,
O' how sweet!

Abba my heart loves You;
I long to know You more,
Fully drink of Your love,
Daily rejoice be - fore You.


2-7-2005 road outside Botanic Garden UBC Palace Vancouver

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
My Dear Abba

1. God’s beloved Son died for me - the veil was torn for-e’er.
Abba ran out to embrace me, covered me with kiss- es.
Arobean daring He gave me. A feast He prepared for me.
He celebrated. He sang and danced —I’ve returned home.

2. My Abba is self-existing, wonderful, glorious.
He is all-wise, all-knowing, almighty, all-loving.
He is the perfect Creator. His goodness man can’t comprehend.
He’s my Father, my dear Abba, my true Abba.

3. The Lord’s Father is my Father; I’m truly born of Him.
His seed fore’er abides in me. I can be most like Him.
The Lord and I are of one. I am Abba’s dearest child,
Joint heir with Christ, inherit all forever.

4. I’m the dearest child of Abba. His Spirit dwells in me.
Tam born of the Spirit; I know I’m Abba’s true child.
In Abba’s love, my heart is free, I know He sings, dances for me.
Let me enjoy the Father’s love throughout my life.

5. Abba spared not His only Son, for me He gave Him up.
How shall He not freely give me all things along with the Lord?!
He loves me as He loves the Lord; He welcomes me, delights in me.
He wants me to sit at His right, to be glorious.

songtext:

Chorus:

I love to embrace you. Tis my pleasure and joy
For you I dance and sing. The love song of my heart

3.  The days ahead are joyous, come fully enjoy my all

author: Fish
songtext:
1. I am born of God. I am his dear child
We are closely united. The highest Father's love
is the same forever and ever

Kissing me with kisses. His delight towards me

3. He gazes upon me,. His desire is for me
For eternity, He thoughts of love for me

4. He gave his Son for me. He gives me all freely.

Father O Father I love you

Oh --- Oh the Life in the — beginning,

0’ Creator, You're self-existed

In love’s deepest union.
With Your in - fi - nite love,
Wisdom and power, You create me for Your-self
To be Your most compatible, dear-est lov - er,

songtext:

Dearest Lord, my Beloved,

2. God’s beloved Son, ©’ my Beloved,

3. Dearest Lord, my I Beloved,

songtext:

In the glo - ry my Lover,

songtext:
D 4/4 The Union of Love

In this whole u- ni -_ verse,
There is no high - er love,

Lord, Your sweet dream of love

Your de - sire is for me,

1-7-2005 ~4am UBC Palace Vancouver

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The Lord's Secret: His Desire is toward Me

From eter - mi- ty past
You thought — of me;
Your pre- cious thoughts of — love

O’ Your desire of love is toward me!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:

It's so pre-cious!Youare my Be - _ loved!

3, 3-2]1-35 | i-2i] 6-

songname: SL1-86 What I have Gained is so Beautiful
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
What I have gained is so  beau-tiful,
More than I can ever dream of,
More than I can obtain in this world;
I cannot exchange it with anything.
Your affection has shown.
You have gladly be - stowed
So that I may know —

What I have gained is so  beau-ti- ful,
More than all the things You have made.
The sky is clear and blue.
The clouds tell your mes- sage,
Much more is Your _ per-son - al love.
You par - take in my life,
Light up all = my days.


What I have gained is so beau-tiful.
I am no longer a slave to sin,
But my heaven-ly Father’s dear child,
And you walk with me in this life journey
Through suff-ring to glory.
Under - stand Your heart, Your de - sire for me,

Enjoy the a-bode withYou and the Father,
All these make me dance with cheer.
What I have gained is so beau-ti- ful.


One day I'll live in the — heav’nly place;

songtext:
My Warm Dwelling Place

In the universe, my heart finds no rest-ing place—
On - ly You are my e - ter-nal rest.
In the universe, to whom can I give my love?
On-ly You’re my _ se- cure rest- ing place.
You are my warm dwell - ing place.
How blessed! We are u - nit - ed!
Fore'er we're in the river of love.

2, Apart from You whom do have in heaven?
Only You worth my heart and worship.
Apart from You I have no desire on earth.

songtext:

Our friendship is long and deep.
You know how to treat Your friend.
When You kiss me,
I for- get the world.
En- joy in Your bo-som of love,
Embrace in ri-ver of love.

2. Day by day our friendship grows deep.
Now is even better.
Your love paved my past journey.
All suffering is sweet to me.
Your love is the same.
Now I know it more.
Your love and desire — ever fresh.
Union with You is so sweet.

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
You have Prepared

Be-fore I realized it, You had prepared all,
Such as the hea-vens and the earth
And the full - ness of them all,
Such as Your love journey and salvation.
Ne-ver knew I could ask for Your help,

Lord, You have come.
My daily bread; clothes for all sea- sons.
In the days I faced endless toils and ceaseless waves,
By the Sea of Tiberias,

Labour- ing all night, be-ing hungry and weary,
When I was pon- der-ingun-der the fig tree—
You have come.
When I fail and lose hope, sure-ly You and Your help
 
Willcome fast - er to me.
O’ Lord, You’re my Brother. You will take care of me,
You will de- feat my enemies,
You will ease my troubles, lead me_ in this life journey.
0’ Lord, I count on You.

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
Only Jesus

Do you know where I can __ find true smiles?
Where does true love hide?
Come andgo, we live and die,
Wand-ring for a thou - sand miles.
Who is will -ing to share with a_ true heart
My laugh-ter and tears?
Who can lead me to the right path,

Chorus: 
On-ly Jesus! On-ly Jesus!
He is the light of man.

Gives me warmth and glorious hope.
He walks with me, He dries my tears,
Gives me abundant life;

Brilliant for - e - ver
Brilliant for- e - ver

songname: SL1-96 The Faith of a Conqueror
author: Fu-Shan Ho
songtext:
The Faith of a Conqueror

My Lord is risen! He has conquered all.
He’s o - vercome pain and death,
Overcome the world, defeated Satan;
Destroyed the po-wer of sin.

Ha! Ha! Hal He’s ri - sen.
He __ lives for- e- ver more.
Ha! Ha! Hal My Lord
Has gained vict’ry for - e - ver!

2. Who shall sep’rate us from the love of Christ?
Shall tribulation, distress,
Or persecution? Or nakedness,
Or famine, peril ors sword?
Neither death, nor r life, angels, principalities,
Can ever sep’rate us from the love of God?

3. Whether gain or loss, whether right or wrong,
Whether abound or in want,

The glo-ry and_ grace Ab-ba saves for me
Are pre-cious and great as the bound-less sea.
Their height and depth can’t be mea - sured.
How blessed_it is — He is my dear Ab- bal!
This deep - est af - fect - ion
Sa-tis - fies His heart and mine.
Long to embrace for - e - ver!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Such af- fect-ion is mytrea-sureof the u- ni - verse.
Unsearch-a- ble! It’s the great-est mi-ra- cle of God.
I’m God’s cre - a-tion, yet I’mborn of Him.
His life and my life are close- ly  u- nit- ed.
The bound-less God is my Ab - ba,
I am His dear - est child.
159
2. Such affection is the treasure of Abba and mine.
Fatherly love is what He and I treasure most.
For His great love He needs me most.
He enjoys embracing me and kissing me.
In Your bosom, closely we walk
Upward journey of love.
Now and ever Abba and I
Walk on the path of love.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
It’s so pre- cious You are my dear Ab - ba.
I am Your dear- est child, dearest child.
What we treasure most isthis deep af-fect- ion,
We en- joy this af -  fect-ion for - e- ver.
Sweet - ly You and I em - brace
In this high - est love.
‘Tis Your sweet dream of love through all Eternity
Brings forth the most won-der - ful plan.
For You, I was cre -  at’d,
Born a - gain. Tm for You.
160
Your love, Your heart— reserved for me.
How glorious! Your lovedream has now come true!
I am in Yourbo -som, Your  be- loved one,
i Se
And I’m joint heir with Christ.
With my dear Lord, I in- he - rit all,
Sit with You on the throne!
You love me as You love _ the Lord!
It's) my e-ter - nal sweet rest!

songname: SL1-162 Rest and Rejoice in Your Bosom
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
G44 Rest and Rejoice in Your Bosom

I’m the dear-est one in Your bo-som.
You love me as You love _ the Lord.
My beau-ti - ful smile glad- dens Your _ heart.
Ev - ery mo- ment You __ treasure.
My Ab-ba,You en - joy lov- ing me.
Yourhand holds my lit - tle hand.
My heart’s content inthis af - fection and love,
Rest ‘nd re-joice in Your bo-som.
2. Day and night You long to see my face.
You love to hear my sweet voice.
Abba, my joy is also Your joy.
You want me to enjoy all.
You meet me with Your love and Your smile.
Your gentleness makes me great.
You desire to give me infinite blessings,
Bring me into glory.
3. Abba, I treasure this deep affection
And You are my dear Abba.
Calling You “Abba” makes my heart feel sweet.
Your bosom is my rest.
This affection — precious, warm and sweet.
You make all stars dance with You.
I rejoice in Your circle of love,
And eternal dance of love.
(Dance of the Royal family!)
Daily You light fireworks, cause all stars to dance,
Celebrate our union!
(Join in our eternal dance!)

songname: SL1-163 Living in the Father's Delight
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
You sent Your Son to be a Man
To die for me on the cross,
So I canlive in Your bo-som.
Now I knowYou  de-light in me.
2. The veil was torn, and You dashed out,
Embraced me to Your heart.
You kissed me, rejoiced for me.
Now I know You delight in me.
3. Abba Father, You have inscribed
My name fore’er on Your palm.
Iam Your beloved son.
Now I know You delight in me.
4. You meet me with Your mercy.
You help me with Your count’nace.
Your thoughts for me exceed the stars.
Now I know You delight in me.
5. You gave me to Your beloved Son
As Your most precious gift.
I am the Lord’s dearest darling.
Now I know You delight in me.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
His Attention of Love

Day and night my Abba sur-rounds me.
He lays His hand on me.
From young to old He car - ries _ me,
Holds me on His lap.
His thoughts of love to me
Are so precious, and so ten-der,
More than the stars and the sand.
O' He is my dear Ab - ba!
(I’m so blessed to have You/Him!)

2. My Abba is acquainted with
My path and my lying down.
When I smile, clap hands and shout for joy,
Abba admires me.
Day ’n night He thinks of me,
Attends to me, knows me deeply.
O’ He shouts for joy for me.
I am His delight and joy.
(It’s so precious I have You/Him!)

3. When I lift my head and raise my hand,
Abba looks at me sweetly.
When I think of Him and sing to Him,
Abba’s heart is ravished.
Precious fatherly love!
It is Your joy to embrace me.
You are my dearest Abba.
We walk hand in hand fore’er.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Father Welcomes Me Home

Once I was lost, a - way from home,
Wand-’ring, grieving in sins.
Abba sent His be - loved Son
To be-come a Man.
He’s for-saken by the Fa-ther.
He drank the bitter cup.
The Lord cried, “It’s finished!” It is finished!
Forever the veil is torn!
I have a new, li- ving way.
I en - ter the Ho - ly Place,
See Ab-ba face to face, behold His — glo-ry.
He press-es me deep - _ ly in-to His heart.
The lost son’s come home. Let’s ce - le - brate!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Par-ents and_friends may for-sake me,
You’re my eternal Fa - ther!
You're Fa-ther of the _ fa - ther-less.
Your e-ter-nal bo - som _ _is mine!
You car- ry me for - e - ver!
2. Your big hand holds my little hand.
Tentrust my life to You.
You will perfect all things for me.
Abba, Your time must be the best.
3. Let me always enjoy with You
This Father-son affection,
Live in the depths of Your heart.
Abba, Your heart is satisfied.

songname: SL1-171  I'm so Precious in Your Heart, O' Lord
songtext:
I'm so Precious in Your Heart, O' Lord
I’m so precious in Your heart, O’ Lord.
You do not just call me Your friend.
You want me to be Your dar-ling.
For- e - ver and e- ver
You de - sire me.

For me You came from heav’n.
You longed to be a Man.
My glorious Lord, You passed through death for me.
You love me. You’re will - ing
To die for me.
You were chastised and for-sa- ken by God.
You bore all shame for me and gave Your life.
On the cross, You o- pened Your heart.
Free-ly I live
In Your deep - — est love.

songname: SL1-174 Your Love, Dream, and Glory
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
You are fair - er than hea- ven,
Be - yond com - pare on earth.
All the stars in heaven
And the flow - — ers on earth
Speak of Your glo - vy,
Your beau - ty, dream and love.
My heart treasures your jour - ney of love.
It warms my heart.
Your de - sire, Your flames of love to me
Is the myst’ry of this whole u- ni-verse.
O’ You are the Lamb who once _ wasslain!
Joy-ful young stag! You’re worthy of my heart.
O’ -Youare a glo-ri- ous young stag!
My true Beloved! Weenjoy our u - nion.

songname: SL1-102 The Infinitely Glorious Lord is Most Deeply United with Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Je-hovah is Your name, You’re - I am who I am.
You are “who is and who was and who is to come”,
Infinte-ly glorious per- son. Your love is person - al.
I love Your wonder-ful name. You’re my greatest treasure.

2. You self-exist — infinite, wonderful, glorious,
Like a waterfall flowing; Your glory’s above all.
Thru’ eternity I’ll have surprising discov’ries.
Your heart belongs to me. We're closely united.
(We can embrace as one.)
(Enthralled in love embrace.)

songname: SL1-177 The Unique, Self-existing, Infinite and Incomparable Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
You're boundless, self-ex - ist- ing. Your glory—I’m a-mazed.
You're the on- ly ho - ly One, who can compare with You?
On- ly You’re always with me, love me with all Your heart.
You al- ways at - tend to me.
Your love thoughts— more than stars.
2. Only You have desired me since eternity past.
Your thoughts of love towards me—ever active and fresh.
Your love is infinitely personal towards me.
You make all work together;
Nothing can distract You.
3. Lord, Your love never changes, it’s forever steadfast.
I forever treasure Your desire towards me.
Your joy and affection overflow like rivers.
Your fervent, beautiful love
Makes me desire, adore.
(Draws my heart towards You.)

author: J. T. Grape
songtext:
Lord, You're the infinite God, at-tend ful-ly to me.
Lord, Your beauti-ful love isthe most person-al.
© Lord, I love You. You're mytrea - sure.
I cherish Yourtrue _ love. It’s be- yond mea - sure.

Infinitely personal is Your love to me.
Your wholehearted, committ’d love
Draws me and captures my heart.
©’ Lord, I love You. You’re my treasure.
In heav’n, on earth there’s no one who can compare to You.
(Lord, You desire me! You long for me.
Your ever o’erflowing love how can I deny?)

songname: SL1-179 The love of the Son of God—
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The love of the Son of God—
Is from e - ter - ni - ty _ past.
I'm in His dream of love.
I'm His se -  cret of love!
‘Tis the love of God!
He’s longed for this u-__ onion.
In one spi- rit, joined heart _ to heart —_as_ one,
In love with Him!
He and I walk on this path of love
With pink _ pe- tals, in the ri-ver of love.
He is God! His love of true Beloved—
Beyond compare! Em- brace me _ to His heart.
(I rest in His bo-som.)

songname: SL1-180 The Deepest Affection of the Son of God
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
O’ Lord, Your life, Your affection and joy
Is like an ever rushing falls.
Ever  overflows, overwhelms my heart.
Now I can drink from Your river of joy.
Day’n night You at- tend to me,
Gazing with Your long - ing.
Your love’s full of passion, romance and beauty
The very flame of Je- ho- vah.
Your reaction is like volcanic eruption.
Your thoughts of love are more than stars.
For me You shout for joy; You sing and dance.
You de - light in me, You de- sire me.
You meet me with lov - ing- kind - ness.
You in my life, in - fi-nite bliss and joy.
In the depth of Your heart,
I en - joy li-ving in love with You.
I feel sa-tis - fied and warm.
(My heart e-ver Oo - ver - flows.)

author: W.H. Honk
songtext:
1. To live in me is Your deep-est  de-sire.
Facing the cross, You sweetly thought of this.
The Spiritcame, You glad-ly live in me.
Sweetest union — You’re with me forever.

2. To live in me is Your eternal dream.
You creat’d me to be closest to You.
Living union! My life’s bound up in Yours.
Union of love — we’re ever heart to heart.
(Deepest union — our hearts are satisfied.)

3. Now is better — You're forever in me.
Glory upon glory, You are my life.
Deepest union surpasses all things.
One day You'll come. I’ll see you face to face.

songname: SL1-183 I'm for You, Your Heart is Reserved for Me
author: Wai-Keung Leung
songtext:
I ap-pear in Your love.
I'll stay in Your love forever.
I ex - ist be-cause of You.
Your heart haslong been re-served for me.
I've been on Your mind
Ever since e- ter-ni - ty past.
E - ter - m-ty is ours—
Re-joice in our em-brace of love.
Walk on the path of end - less love.
You have dreamed of me since eternity past.
For- e - ver we will live in love,
The end - less dream!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The song of songs re-veals Your heart,
So I can en -_ joy Your heart.
You lead me to in - ner chambers.
Now I knowYou de-light in me.

2. I have captured Your heart and sight.
I’m Your lily among thorns.
Your banner o’er me is love.
Now I know You delight in me.

3. Forever, Lord, You are a Man.
You came leaping on mountains
To see my face and hear my voice.
Now I know You delight in me.

4. Abba prepares a wedding feast,
Gives me to You as “beloved”.
I’m Your greatest treasure and joy.
Now I know You delight in me.

5. You praise me, “You are all fair,
No blemish, capture My heart.”
I satisfy You the most.
Now I know You delight in me.

6. My eyes have overcome You
I’ve captured Your heart and sight.
I’m Your only perfect one.
Now I know You delight in me.

7. From feet to head You praise me
I am Your delight and joy,
Capture Your heart. You desire me.
Now I know You delight in me.

8. May we embrace forever.
Your heart is reserved for me.
I was creat’d to satisty You.
Now I know You delight in me.

9. I’mset as aseal on Your heart,
As aseal upon Your arm.
The flames of love is strong as death.
Now I know You delight in me.

songname: SL1-187 Living in the Lord’s Delight
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. You leaped with joy, came as a child.
You saw the joy a - head,
Despised all shame, endured the cross.
Now I knowYou delight in me.

2. Your personal love towards me
Made You give Yourself for me.
Your desire, Your flame of love,
Now I know You delight in me.

3. Your eternal dream of love is
To live fore’er in my heart.
My heart is Your favourite dwelling.
Now I know You delight in me.

4. Howcan I not respond to You?
I long to love You only,
Day and night draw near to You.
O’ Lord Jesus, may You come soon.

songname: SL1-188 Your Desire and Gazing Day and Night
author: J.A. Butterfield
songtext:
1. Day and night, think of me, desire me, dear Lord,
You al- ways at-tend to me.
You long to see my face, hear my voice, dear Lord,
Sweet - ly and close-ly live with me.
Since e - ter- ni- ty You have loved me, dear Lord,
Un - chang-ing, o’er-flow- ing, e- ver fresh.
Living in the depth of Your heart and embrace,
I feel so sweet. My heart o’erflows.

2. Fully You involve Yourself in my life, Lord,
Now and through all eternity.
Forever live with You, in love with You, Lord,
Nothing can compare my joy.
Now] live in Your love and desire, dear Lord,
My heart’s satisfied, overflowing.
With all my heart I’ll respond to You, dear Lord.
Forever we embrace in love.

songname: SL1-190 I am Your Sweet Heart
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
1. I am Your hap - pi - ness.
I am Your great de - light.
I am the sweetness of Your heart.
I’m the dear- est in Your heart.

2. I am Your great work.
I am Your glory.
I am Your model of love.
I’m the dearest in Your heart.

3. I think of You — You rejoice.
I praise You — You enjoy.
Your heart is sweetened by my songs.
I’m in Your heart forever.

songname: SL1-191 How to Behold Him—Your Most Real True Beloved
author: T.E. Perkins
songtext:
How to Behold Him—Your Most Real True Beloved

1. My Lord is now in glo-ty and He is every-where.
He is surrounding me and _ living in my heart.
He is more real than all things, deep-ly unit’d with me.
I have His special presence, the most blessed u-nion.

2. My Lord is now in glory and He is everywhere.
He is surrounding mé and living in my heart.
His personal love to me is ever infinite.
His wholehearted, commit’d love is warm and draws my heart.

3. Weare ever united — deepest, closest union.
This love union’s beautiful, romantic, colourful.
My heart’s warm, overflowing as we’re on this love path.
The love of my true Beloved fills my heart, heav’n and earth.
(It’s my rest. I’m content.)

songname: SL1-192 Daily You are before Me
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
1. Search no more, for dai-ly You’re before me,
Close-ly, closely You look at me, hear me,
With a big smile, full of delight and joy.
You are everywhere,
Yet I have Your spe-cial presence.

2. There’s not a moment You're not gazing at me.
You surround me, fully commit Yourself.
Unceasingly, we have love interflow.
I'll be anchored in Your infinite, personal love.

author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
After this I will return, I will re-turn
And I will build a- gain David's taber-na - cle,
Which has fall - en down.
Ill re - build its ruins
And I will set it up.

songname: SL1-194 The Lord’s Desire and Mine
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Father, I de-sire that they whom You have given me
Be with Me where I am, be with Me where I am
So that they may see My glory which You have given Me,
For You loved Me be-fore the foundation of the world.
I de-sire to be in them,
Be one spirit with them,
Most deeply united, live with them day and night,
En - joy the sweetest u - _nion,
Live in the river of love.

2. Father, I desire that wherever the Lord is
Tl be with Him forever, with Him foréver
To see the Lord's glory which You have given to Him,
For You loved me and the Lord before the world was.
I treasure the Lord lives in me;
I’m in the depth of His heart.
Most deeply united, we are in one spirit,
Enjoy the sweetest union.

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
That is the day, the wedding feast of the Lamb.
Thatis the feast setby Abba, the core of His plan.
That is the day of the glad - ness of His heart —
The Lord waits ev - ery day.
We are not in-vit-ed to the feast, but indeed
We are the glorious _ bride of the Lamb,
Compatible to the Lord.
He died for us — He used His blood
And His truelove to be-troth us.
How joy-ous He is that He hasgained my heart.
And on that day — my dear Lord’ll come to hold my hand.
Before all things He'll declare His heart is for-e-ver mine.
We are al-ways the je - wel of His heart.
His love is in our _ hearts.
No one can e - ver set us a-part.
Fore’er we are heart to heart.
He has poured forth His high - est love.
He won't turnback; to Him I be - long.
We are in love fore'er.

songname: SL2-2 Love Journey of the Lord - from Infant to Adult
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
He became flesh, dwelt among men.
He’s full of grace and full of truth.
His glory shone in this dark world.
He is so good; he is all fair

My gracious lord sojourned on earth
He had no place to lay his head.
He is the light shines in the darkness,
Righteous among the unrighteous.

Man of sorrows, for all his life, 
He was reviled acquainted with grief
My lord humbled himself and walked 
on the path of self-denial.

author: Wai-Keung Leung
songtext:
The morn light shines on this sleeping land
A wakens thousand souls.
God’s great love vast as boundless ocean;
Deep in you, deep in me the same we feel:
His love perfect and true
Let us grow together, 
Whit our songs send off the winter
Vines giving fragrance
Voice od turtle doves has been heard
Let us rise, and say goodbye
To all fancies, pride and sighs;
To the promised land,
Fairest resting place, let us strive!

Why stay dreams of passing splendors?
Soon they’ll all disappear
Oh my dear, don’t look back and keep sighing;

author: Wai-Keung Leung
songtext:
I surrender my all to satisfy you, Lord.
Thought rugged is the way, follow the trails of your flock
Every step as I see more my weakness,
I will praise your love more and more.
Your banner over me is love. I’m conquered.
You are my heart’s desire, I lay down riches and fame.
You are full of grace; Your bosom’s my resting place.
Lord, put me like a steak over your heart.
Put like a seal upon your arm.
For love is as strong as death, all the words can’t replace.
O’Lord, I long  for you, to see your glorious face.
Take up my cross today,
Till you come I’ll watch and wait.

songname: SL2-7 Mountain of myrrh, Hilo of Frankincense
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
To the Mountain of myrrh,
I will taste death for you;
To the hill of Frankincense,
I’ll pray for you, bless you.
Until the day breaks,
The shadows flee away,
 I will return and take you
 To our sweet home above.

Lord Jesus, I love you 
ON earth I live for you.
On this path of suffering,
I will never turn back.
Oh me beloved,
May “ the day”soon come! When the shadows flee away,
You will receive home! 

hurry my Beloved
Leaping like a gazelle,
On the mountains of spices.
You will come soon, come soon
My bright morning Star,
The night is far spent.
May you return from the blue,
Take me into glory

songname: SL1-9 My eyes of faith behold
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
My eyes of faith behold
the lamb once slain for me
 covered with wounds!
you suffered much for me;
You long to see my face.
I should love You always
cherish your face!

My eyes of faith behold
the risen, good shepherd
with mighty pow‘r!
you’re with ,e all my days
 Through trials, flood and flames.
i will be strong and brave, rejoice always.

My eyes of faith， behold
 My beloved IB glory
 With love and grace!
You set me on Your heart,
Think of me day and night
 In your bosom I’ll stay, rest with delight.

My eyes of faith behold
 My bridegroom coming soon
Full of glory!
You’ll take me by Yourself,
 To be with you always
 I’ll watch and wait for your glorious coming!

author: A. B. Simpson
songtext:
Yesterday, today, forever,
Jesus is the same;
All may change, but Jesus never!
 Glory to his name!
Glory to his name!
Glory to his name!
All may change, but Jesus never!
Glory to his name!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. I behold the bright Morning Star. 
I'll leave this world, heaven to g0 
Bright Morning Star, I long for You. 
Dark is the world, the night's far spent.

 2. I can see the finish line. 
I'll run the course, steadfast I'll go. 
Short is the time. God's will be done. 
Forget the past, march on forward. 

3. I see the church will be finished. 
With diligence I'll serve my Lord. 
Things of this world will pass away. 
My labour is never in vain. 

4. I can see the Lord's coming soon. 
In Him I will trust and obey. 
Say no to sin, endure all trials. 
You will dry my tears when You come.

5. I can see the crowns and rewards. 
I'll gladly bear shame for the Lord. 
Take up my cross, follow the Lord. 
I wait for His praises with joy. 

6. I can see the coming glory. 
I'll despise all trials and pain. 
Light affliction's working for us 
The eternal weight of glory.

 7. I can see my heavenly home. 
As a pilgrim I live on earth. 
This world has no lasting city. 
A fairer home's prepared for me.

author: J. Newton
songtext:
Amazing grace

A maz - ing grace! How sweet the sound 
That saved wretch like me! 
I once was lost, but now am found. 
Was blind, but now I see.

2. Twas grace that taught my heart to fear, 
And grace my fears relieved.
How precious did that grace appear 
The hour I first believed! 

3. The Lord hath promised good to me, 
His word my hope secures. 
He will my shield and portion be 
As long as life endures.

4. Through many dangers, toils and snares, 
I have already come. 
Tis grace hath brought me safe thus far, 
And grace will lead me home. 

5. When I've been there ten thousand years, 
Bright shining as the sun, 
We've no less days to sing God's praise 
Than when I first begun.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. I'm really really rich! 
Almighty God is my Father. 
Jesus Christ has thousand names 
To satisfy my every need. 
Holy Spirit abides in me. 
He is my Helper forever. 
I have a warm, eternal home 
And the Bible dearer than gold.

2. See the sky and clouds so bright, 
Flowers and trees, mountains and seas 
Birds and bugs give tunes so nice. 
The moon and stars light up the night. 
My Lord walks with me all the way, 
Giving me joy, faith, hope and love. 
I have glad tidings of glory 
For thousands souls in misery.

3. O Lord, make me give, give, give. 
Make me a giver all my life. 
More I have as more I give 
Till overflowing in my heart. 
Giving water to little ones, 
Eternal reward will bring me. 
"Better to give than to receive.' 
Five loaves, two fish can feed many.

Gain Christ 

1. I was lost in worldly pleasures, 
And indulged in mortal things; 
Strayed from "Fount' of Living Water," 
Bound in sin, how mis'rable! 
Now, the glory of Christ draws me. 
My heart's melted in His great love: 
Forget things behind, reach forward. 
Press toward the goal ahead. 

2. All things that are under the sun, 
Are vanity, toils in vain. 
Soon the world, its lusts will vanish. 
As the mist, none will remain. 
The Lord alone will never change. 
Only He satisfies my heart. 
Whom have I in heaven but Christ? 
I desire nothing on earth.

Whatever things were gain to me, 
All I have counted as loss 
For knowing Christ Jesus my Lord, 
My greatest treasure of all. 
For whom I have suffered the loss 
Of all things, and count'd them as dross, 
That I may gain Christ my Lord, 
That I may gain Christ my Lord.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Christ is My Life 

1. If then you were raised with 
Christ, Seek those things above, 
Where Christ is, seated at the right hand of God. 

2. Set your mind on things above, 
Not on the things on earth; 
For you died, and your life's hidden with Christ in Go 

3. When Christ, who is our life, 
Who is our life, appears, 
You will also appear with Him in glory. 

(Ref. Col. 3:1-4)

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Behold, behold what manner of love 
Abba has bestowed on us, 
That we should be called children of God! 
And we are children of God! 

2. Therefore the world does not know us, 
Because it did not know Him. 
Therefore the world does not know us, 
Because it did not know Him. 

3. Beloved, now we are children of God, 
What we shall be has not shown. 
But we know that when He is revealed, 
We shall be like Him, like Him. 

4. For we shall see Him as He is, 
And everyone who has 
This hope in Him purifies himself 
Just as the Lord is pure. 

(Ref. 1 John 3:1-3)

songname: SL2-22 The Thrill in the Love of the Cross
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
O' Lord, keep me near the cross, 
May I perceive Your heart. 
Let Your love pierce through my soul,
I shall never be free
Lord, your love of the cross 
Thrills my heart immensely! 
Could I still live for my-self? 
Should I ignore your love?

2. God's own Son walked to the cross, 
Such love is amazing! 
I am captured by His cross, 
I surrender myself. Lord, 
Your love of the cross 
Thrills my heart immensely! 
This love conquers, compels me 
To be same heart with You.

songname: SL2-24 Sit in Heaven with the Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Sit in Heaven with the Lord 

What a-ma zing Im-mense and bound-less! 
I am in Christ –
Died with You, live with You, sit in heaven with You. 
Your love journey on earth was all for me. 

2. In heav'n I sit with You! I am whiter than snow! 
My sins no more! 
I'm holy as the Lord, dwell in the Holy Place. 
Forever Abba's smiles brighten my heart. 

3. In heav'n I sit with You! What amazing grace - 
Beyond measure! 
The Father welcomes me as He welcomes the Lord. 
Forever I live in this grace and love. 

4. My perfect Christ for me appears before God. 
You're my High Priest! 
Perfectly You've brought me to the Father's bosom. 
This highest Father's love belongs to me.

5. In heav'n I sit with You. This wondrous love and grace 
Makes me amazed. 
I'm closest to Abba. He delights in me. 
I'm precious as the Lord in Abba's heart. 

6. In heav'n I sit with You. This wondrous love and grace 
Who can fathom? 
Abba has given me precious identity. 
O'I am my Abba's dearest treasure! 

7. In heav'n I sit with You - I'm closest to Abba, 
Sit by His side. 
He gives me great glory. I am enthroned with Him. 
I will reign with Abba eternally. 

8. In heav'n I sit with You. God has opened His heart - 
Love overflows. 
Now He can freely pour out His love on me. 
O' He's dancing for me with great delight! 

9. In heav'n I sit with You – enjoy Abba's embrace, 
Warmest welcome! 
I can see Abba's heart beautiful, committed. 
He desires me to be closest to Him.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Rejoice Rejoice! The Lord’s risen
Overcame Satan and death, He is risen
Rejoice! Rejoice! The Lord’s risen
How can I forget his love appearing


2. The Lord’s appearing wiped off my tears
His Father my Father, I’m dear to him
The Lord’s appearing Removed my grief
It’s too good to be true, I clung to Him

3. The Lord’s appearing Cast off my fear
The Lord’s love with never change
My heart’s comfort’d.
The Lord’s appearing Opened my eyes,
Took away all my sorrow
My heart’s fervent

4. He appeared to me And gave me peace.
He sent me to the world To work with Him
He appeared to me Showed me His wounds
My Lord and my God I love you so! 

5. He appeared to me By the seashore
He prepared breakfast for me with tender love
He said to me “Do you love me?
If you do, shepherd My sheep And follow me”

6. He commissioned me On the mountain
To finish the glorious church, Wait till He comes
I ‘ll never forget His face and voice.
With same mind I’ll work with Him, strive till He comes

7. He appeared to me, Opened my eyes,
My Brother - The Son of God
Who came for me.
He’s the son of Man, The same with me.
Yet He is without sin. He’s glorious.

8. On Mount of Olives He said to me,
You ‘ll receive the Spirit. Be My witness
When He’s blessing me, He’s taken up
Ascended to the Father, Living for me

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Chorus: 
My dearest Lord, may You come soon!
May you re-turn quickly from the blue. 
Bright Morning Star, may You come soon! 
Take me to the clouds to meet with You. 

Lord, I have been waiting for so long, 
E-ven dark hair has be-come Grey.
The night of this world is far spent, 
How much longer should all groan and wait?

2. You should guard your heart with all your strength
Watching, waiting for His coming. 
Strive for God, abound in His work, 
For toil in Him is not in vain. 

3. Things of this world will soon pass away. 
The night's far spent, the dawn's at hand. 
Lift our heads and bravely march on. 
Run the race for Him unto the end.

songname: SL2-31 He is the God Who Gives Me Hope
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. I put my faith in the glo - rious God. 
He's a-ble to raise the dead-the Lord of life. 
I put my faith in the glo - rious God. 
He can make all from no - thing-the Cre - a - tor! 

2. He's full of life, He's full of might. 
He gives life to my spirit when I am down. 
He has the pow'r of resurrection. 
He gives strength to my spirit when I am weak. 

3. He is the God who gives me hope. 
He's my song, He is my strength. He makes smile. 
He is the God who gives me joy. 
He has turned my mourning into dancing. 

4. In the wilderness He lays a feast. 
He can make rivers flow in the desert. 
I have hope in all circumstances. 
Ha! Ha! Ha! Almighty God is my Abba!

5. O'my brethren, lift up your head. 
Your Abba, almighty God, loves you the most.
O'my brethren, march on forward!
Your Abba, almighty God, loves you the most.
(Your Abba, almighty God, carries you.)

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Smile all the day, for You are by my side. 
Smile all the day, for Your love surrounds me. 
I'm of good cheer even in various trials, 
For You are holding all authority. 

2. While I'm tempted, let me smile to You still, 
For You've overcome the world and the foes! 
Your grace's enough. The Spirit gives me life. 
You uphold me walking on life's billows! 

3. You carry me through the days of trouble. 
Even in battles, I can smile by You. 
Pressed by the foes, I still see Your face. 
Before the foes You lay a feast for me. 

4. With You I pass through floods and flames in life; 
Our friendship deepens as the days go by. 
Suff ring with You makes sweetest memories. 
It works for me the eternal glory.

5. My dear brethren, we can only live once. 
Let's bear the cross for Him in this brief life. 
Break my vial, offer Him perfume today. 
Anoint Him with love, give our heart to Him.

author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
I should praise God every day. 
Then I live the normal way.
Great is the Lord and highly to be praised. 
His greatness can't be mea 

2. I should praise God every day, 
Consider His love and grace. 
My heart is strengthened and always fervent, 
Till His glorious return. 

3. I should praise God every day, 
Look upon his glorious face, 
Give praises of faith. Weakness becomes strength. 
Shut the mouth of enemies. 

4. I should praise God every day, 
Glorify His name always. 
Shout for joy, clap hands, sing praise and dance. 
Rejoice before Him always.

O' most beautiful among women, 
What is your beloved more than other beloved
What is your beloved more than other be-loved, 
O' fairest one, that you so charge us? 
My be-loved's dazz - ling and ruddy. 
Out- stand ing a - mong ten thousand
His head the fin-est gold, pure gold;
his locks are wavy, his locks are wavy 
Black as a raven.
His eyes as doves by the rivers, 
With milk they're washed and fitly set.
A bed of spices, banks of scent-ed herbs are his cheeks. 

His lips are like li - lies 
Dripping quid myrrh. 
His hands are like the rods of gold 
And set with beryl. 
His body is carved ivo ry, 
as In - laid with sapphires.  
His legs, pillars of mar - ble, 
Set on bases of fine gold. 
His bear as lebanon, Excellent as the cedars. 
His mouth is full of sweetness,
He's altogether lovly. 
O' daughters of Jerusalem, 
This is my beloved and this is my friend. 
O' most beautiful among wo-men, 
Where about has your be-loved gone? 
Where has your be-loved turned aside? 
We will seek him together with you, 
We will seek him together with you.

songname: SL1-39 One Sacrifice for Sin Forever
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Priest sus Christ as the High Je 
Had of-fered one sacrifice 
For sins for - e - ver and He sat down. 
right hand of God, at His At the 
From that time He's wait - ing, He's wait 
Un - til His e-ne-mies are made His footstool. 

2. For by one offering, 
For by one offering, 
He has perfected forever, forever 
All those who are being sanctified. 
The Spirit also testifies to us, 
I’ll remember no more their sins and lawless deeds.

(Ref. Heb. 10:12-15, 17)

songname: SL2-40 The Great Love of the Father
songtext:
1. Abba, Father is rich in mercy. 
Because of His great love for me, 
When I was dead in my transgressions, 
He made me live with Christ my Lord, 
And raised me up together with Him,
 Seat'd me in heaven with Him; 
And raised me up together with Him, 
Seat'd me in heaven with Him. 

2. Abba, Father's boundless love for me 
Forever is my rest and peace. 
He loves the Lord, the same He loves me, 
Without reserve, wholeheartedly. 
Abba Father, open my eyes, 
And let me see Your true heart. 
I'll be carefree; I'll live joyfully, 
Rest in Your bosom of love.

songname: SL2-41 Your Grace Makes Me Strong and Brave
author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
Your Grace Makes Me Strong and Brave

Lord, our grace makes me strong and brave,
Helps me walk on and be stead-fast
Thinking of Your love, bountiful grace,
How can my heart turn back?

Arise now, O’ my spirit
Fear no giants nor mountains
Arise now, O’ my spirit
Heed the voice of the Lord

Lord Your grace makes me strong and brave
You can turn weakness into strength
You change dry bones into a great army
You give life to the dead

Lord Your grace makes me strong and brave,
I despise all trials and pain
I can sing in dark night full of great hope
By You I can do all things

songname: SL2-43 Press on Towards the Goal
author: Kwok-Wah Lee
songtext:
Whatever things were gain to me,
For Christ I have counted as loss,
For the surpassing value of knowing Christ
To gain Christ I count all as dross
Not that I have laid hold of it
There’s only one thing in my heart
Forget what’s behind, reach forward to what’s ahead,
I press on toward the goal

*
Yet, I am continually with You;
You hold me by my right hand.
With your counsel Youll guid me.
Then receive me to glory
Besides You there’s nothing I desire

Now, I press on toward the goal,
For the prize of the upward call,
For the prize of the upward call of God in Christ,
I mind not things of this world

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
I treasure You are my best friend.
You have searched me and known me.
You know my thoughts from afar off
All my desires are before You

O’ my dear Lord, You know all things.
You are mindful of my thoughts.
Let me open my heart to You
You know my thoughts before they’re told

You have known me inside-out Lord,
Your perfectly understand me.
Teach me how to live with You
To be set free and without fears.

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
1. What would be heaven's beauty
If you were not there?
No longer would it be
My heart's desire

2. Fairer is our heav'nly home,
Which You have prepared.
One day You and I'll
Dwell in this new place

songname: SL2-47 My Father is Infinitely Great
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
When I see all the stars,
I think of. Your glory.
You're the endless fountain,
Over flowing with love,
May Your glory ever capture my heart.
I desire nothing besides You
Let me behold Your beauty

All I will be draw a way
Your are the boundless One
Greater than the universe.
All things in this world

Have become minor to me
Your vast bosom of love is my rest.
Let m always stay in Your embrace.
O' how precious I am your dearest child,

O' how sweet!

Father, my heart loves you
I long to know you more
Fully drink of your love,
Daily rejoice before you

songname: SL2-49 Lean on the Father's Bosom
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1.Father, I'll lean on Your bosom, 
In Your love I'm ful - ly healed. 
Rest in Your bosom of love, 
En - joy Your sweet kiss - es. 

2. Father, I'll lean on Your bosom. 
I'll feel Your beautiful heart, 
Where Your endless love flows 
As a spring quenching my thirst. 

3. Father, lean on Your bosom. 
Let me hear Your words of love. 
Your love and Your bosom 
Forever capture my heart.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. The Com-fort-er has come. 
It's the Father's promise.  
0' how precious it is, 
for- e'er He lives in me, 
Like a well of water, 
And I will never thrist.
  
2. The Comforter has come. 
Fore'er He lives in me. 
He never leave me, 
helps me in time of need. 
0' how gentle He is. 
His love is long and deep. 
He'll bring me to glory. 

3. He's always by my side. 
We go through floods and fires. 
He speaks comfort to me. 
He makes me full of hope. 
He gives me my vineyard, and I'll sing to the Lord. 
I'm in love with the Lord.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Slapping scourging, purple robe, crowns of thorns!
The Lord bore the anguish alone.
On Calvary He was nailed on the cross,
Sufered willingly for us all.
The saviour poured out Himself,
His life, His love for me;
He was earnest to gain my hearts,
Even died for me on the cross.

2. Huge tides of love shattered the wall of sin,
A guilt-purging fountain opendd.
It is finished! He declared on the cross,
Perfect salvation accomplished!
When I consider His heart,
I'm moved by this great love.
For His salvation grace and love,
Fore'er I'll love Him with my all.

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
Love! Love has no end, it never fails -
Tis my spirit's experience.
Sometimes, I even find myself ordinary.
Yet, beyond the sky, in this universe,
There is a gaze o tender love on me.
Each time when I lift up my head,
The moment we meet,
I know that I am no ordinary,
Because I have ravished His heart.
(For He is a man forever.)

author: Violin Chan
songtext:
You and I far apart, but our hearts are closest
We cannot meet face to face.
We may not say too may words.
Yet I know Your heart and You know me well.
We're heart to heart.
Though You're in heaven I'm on earth.
You pured out Your all for my blessing.
I offer myself to strive for You.
You watch me from above, I'll fix my eyes on You.
For a while we're apart, but we ar eon forever.
One day we'll meet face to face.
I'll be overwhelmed with joy beyond compare!

songname: SL2-56 Taste the Perfect Fruit of the Cross
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. My eyes of faith behold the Father's heart;
I fully trust in the pow'r of the blood!
Boldly by faith, come to the throne of grace,
See with my eyes the Father's sweet welcome;
Enjoy the bliss of sitting in heaven with Christ
I fully taste the sweet perfect fruit of the cross.

2. My I behold the worth of Jesus' blood,
Gladly be drawn by Abba's sweet welcome;
My spirit's free. I dwell in His love.
My eyes of faith fore'er capture His heart.
Let me always look upon Jesus and His cross,
Compelled by love, moved by His grace, I'll march forward.

3. How warm and sweet is the fruit of the cross,
Sets free my soul to sing and dance with joy!
The Father's heart, His similing face-how warm!
The Lord's embrace, His tender words=how sweet!
In God's circle of love and fellowship I live.
Heaven on earth, I foretaste heavenly bliss.

songname: SL2-58 Life up Your Head and Rejoice
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. All the trees raise their hands.
All the flow'rs lift up their heads.
O' my soul,
Behold the Lord He's now in glory!

2. All the trees make melody
And the birds sing along.
O' my soul,
Rejoice! Rejoice! Rejoice in the Lord!

3. Vict'ry leaves say, It's finished!
Heart-shaped leaves speak of His love.
O' my soul,
Enjoy God's love, the fruit of the cross!

songname: SL2-59 Resting Place of My Heart
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. May I oft' con sider 
With me forever You abide.
My heart is forever Your desire
Day and night You are here by my side

2. May I oft' gaze at You, 
Set You always before my eyes.
 My heart's glad and peaceful in Your presence. 
My faith has captured Your heart. 

3. May I have eyes like dove's 
To see You living in heav'n for me, 
Consider that You live in my heart. 
I set my love and my thoughts on You. 

4. May You gain every day 
My mind, my love and my will. 
You are the glorious vision of my heart. 
In Your love I rest in great delight. 

5. When I awake from sleep,
Let me first behold You in heaven.
Consider that You are with me always,
Walking with me toward each new day.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Every stage of my life let me give my love response
To my dear Lord in different times.
In my youth, I loved you; enjoyed heaven on earth.
My vision was clear and bright,
I strived for You in my twenties.
In my prime I built the church through all the trials.
I treasure to strive for You!
From now on to the day we meet,
May I give You my love more and more.
I will go from peak to peak.
Thank you, my dear Lord, You take care of my life.
Your love and grace fill all my life journey.
You make my path shine until the perfect day,
Ever brighter!
Seeing Your face, I’ll love You more,
More than all words can tell.

songname: SL2-63 Press on to the Finish line
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The stage of Christ, feast of the Lamb i see!
Afflictions of this world brief and light.
With joy I fight, by faith I march on.
Let’s kindle the revival fire,
And press toward the goal.
Let’s run the race,
And build His church
To the end of the earth!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The Lord’s Commission in 1964

To glorify the Lord, revive the church,
And bring many to the Father,
Deny myself, by faith live for Him
Heav’nly vision compels my heart.
Bravely I’ll march forward.
One day He’ll come!
I’ll see His face.
O’ let us rejoice.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. I have behold “the worlds of love”
Shining throughout the universe
The Lord and I shall ever reign.
We’ll fly with joy in worlds of love

2. I have beheld the worlds of love
More than the sand and the stars.
There ‘ll be no end to the increase
Of His peace and government.

songname: SL2-66 The Lord's Sorrow and His Beloved in the Garden
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. My dear Lord faced the power of darkness,
He alone fore - tast'd the cup.
In the gar - den so grieved, He prayed in tears.
His sweats were like drops of blood.

2. The Lord found His disciples asleep.
They could not watch for a while.
"The spirit is willing; the flesh is weak,"
He said with sympathy.

3. The Lord found His disciples asleep.
He did not blame nor complain.
With love, He urged them to watch and pray,
Lest they enter temptations.

4. He found them weary and asleep again.
He was driven to die for them.
He looked upon them with compassion.
His heart was deeply moved.

5. He longed for them to be with Him fore'er,
Sit on the throne with them.
He treasured their friendship in those three years,
The days of laughter and tears.

6. How could He not give Himself for them?
How could He not drink the cup?
He's willing. Eagerly He prayed in tears,
"Father, may Your will be done!"

7.O Lord, I am amazed at Your love.
I'm Your drive to go to the cross.
I'll always think of Your life-yielding love.
May I love You only.

8. All the days of my life I'll consider
My favoured position in You.
May I be mindful of Your gaze of love,

songname: SL2-68 The Blood of the Lamb -- Foundation of Victory
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
They overcame Satan by the blood of the Lamb
And by their testimonies.
The did no love their lives even when faced with death,
Even when faced with death.
May glory and praises
Be to the Lamb of God who was slain,
To the Lamb forever and ever.

songname: SL2-212 If the Lord Comes Today
author: Kin-Sau Lee
songtext:
My Lord Jesus when will you return?
How much longer we still have to wait
The night is far spent. The dawn is at hand.
We now You will soon return!

May be by today,
I’ll see my Lord face to face!
May be by next day!
Let’s adorn ourselves to watch and wait

Tis our only want for many years,
The hope of the saint who fell asleep,
And the one same cry through all the ages,
Come quickly, O’ Lord Jesus!

Soon our home above will be ready
The Son of Man will come in glory!
Let us build God’s household after His heart,
Bearing love and unity!

songname: SL2-71 The Day That You will Crown Me
author: Chong-Fai Wong
songtext:
When I think of the day You will crown me,
Which is the day You come to take me,
I can’t imagine how I’ll be
Overwhelmed with joy

In the presence of all You’ll show Your love for me.
Your deep love for me thrills heavens and earth.
All tears and sorrows will pass away.
You know well all my labour 
The wounds on me will change to b e
Prints and marks of love
O’ … my love for You
No words can tell but You know well --
My heart feels sweet.
My dear Lord, for Your love,
I’ll cast my crowns before You on that day.

author: Wai-Hong Lee
songtext:
Though the morning Star has not appeared,
The world’s signs, Bible prophecies
Make it clear the dawn is near;
Let me fight battles daily!
In my heart is the hope of glory.
Be steadfast till the task’s achieved.
Today and tomorrow march on still,
For the toil in God is not in vain.
Be faithful till death the crown to gain.
When the last trumpet we’ll hear that day,
Lift our eyes, and see His glorious face.
Endless jubilation!
Our body will be changed!
We’ll exult and glory
We’ll be filled with overwhelming joy,
Winging to the air with all the saints.
O’ what a glorious moment!
To the air I long to wing my flight!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
God who did not spare His only beloved Son
But for us He gave Him up,
How will He not also with the Lord
Freely give us all, give us all, give us all?
How will He not also with the Lord
Freely give us all,
Freely give us all?

author: Wan-Shan Sze, Kwok-Wah Lee
songtext:
Like an apple tree of the woods,
So is my Beloved among the sons.
I sit down in His shade with joy;
His fruit is sweet to my taste
He brings me to the banquet hall;
His banner over me is love.
Provide me with cakes of raisins
To sustain me, sustain me.
Give me apples to refresh me,
Because I am love sick
His left hand is under mu head;
Hid right hand embraces me.
O' daughter of Jerusalem,
I charge you by the gazelles,
Or by the does of the field,
Do not stir up nor awaken love.
Wait until it pleases

songname: SL2-78 My Eyes of Faith See His Heart
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1.My Eyes of Faith See His Heart
Engraved with my glorious name,
See His precious thoughts and longing toward me.
His countenance and His bosom
Are my joy, my satis-faction, perfect rest.

2. My eyes of faith see the Lord's arm
Sealed with my lovely name,
See His mighty and gracious hand uphold me.
His arms of love tightly hold me.
I feel so warm—His embrace heals my heart.

3. My eyes of faith see the Father's
Smiling face, love and welcome.
He's waiting to embrace me with sweet kisses.
My Abba's love satisfies me.
His affection and love fill the universe.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The road of faith get brighter as I walk on
The road of faith gets more joyous and glorious
The road of faith reveals the Lord's preciousness.
The road of faith draws me closer to the Lord.

* Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha! Ha!
By faith I overcome the world
By faith I never thirst
Living water flows from my heart.

2. Shall I be afraid of tribulations?
He has overcome the world, satan, and death
He has promised to be with me always
Till the day when I shall see His glorious face.

3. The Lord's risen and ascended to heaven.
For me He lives and olds all authority.
He makes use of the enemies and problmes.
He makes all things work together for my good.

songname: SL2-80 Take up the Task and Sojourn for the Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
I'm a stranger and pilrim on earth.
I long for a better home above.Gladly would I sojourn all my life.
fight the good fight as He sends me.
I would rather live just like the Lord
Who had no place to lay His head.
By faith reach to the end of the earth
Be one whom the world's not worthy.

2.Let's take the commission of the Lord,
Build the church according to His will.
Spread the truth to all nations and lands.
The church we'll revive and rebuild.
By faith, climb mountains and cross the Red Sea.
By faith, I boast and shout for joy.
By faith, I satisfy His heart.
By faith, I praise His name!

3. For the Lord, I count all things as loss.
O' Lord, keep my heart to the end.
Ever be faithful and pure to Him,
Love Him more than I first began.
By faith I feed on His faithfulness,
Fortress and giants are my food.
By faith march on with joy always.
By faith I live for Him.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. I love to be alone with You.
Freely I talk to You.
Every mornign Your love is new
May you renew my heart.

2. Alone with You in our secret place —
This is our sweet moment.
O' Father of almighty pow'r,
My heart is unveiled to You.

3. Father, nothing I hide from You,
Open my heart to You.
You're full of mercies and comfort.
I pour out my heart to You.

4. As Your dear child, peacefully I rest
In Your bosom of love.
Fatherly love fills all my heart,
My sorrow, troubles are gone.

5. Alone with You, I am most set free,
In lauughter or in tears.
Gladly I'll be away from friends,
To be with You only

6. The groom will soon glorious appear,
Take me to Father's home
With endless joy I'll see Your face
In heaven, our eternal home

songname: SL2-85 I was Created for the Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. With Your infinite Love,
Wisdom, and pow'r
You made me to be 
Your best creation:
Compatible with you
In harmony with You.
Each other we delight,
I'm in love with You.

2. My Lord, for Yourself, You creat'd me
Compatible with You, I'm Your closest one.
One spirit I'm with You, most deeply united,
Heart to heart we belong, I'm Yours, You are mine.

3. My Lord, for Yourself, You creat'd me
To enjoy your great love, satisfy Your heart.
Day and night I'm with You, in love with You fore'er
Hold sovereignty with You till eternity.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven
He led captive a host of captive.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He won the vict'ry and gave gifts to men.
God has exalted my Lord,
Crowned Him with glory and honour.
He's waiting His foes to be His footstool. Hal-le-lu-jah!

2.Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
Sitting at the right of the Highest.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
As head over all things to the church.
My Lord has been glorified,
And the Spirit lives in me forever.
In one spirit I am with the Lord.
Hallelujah!

3. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He's my Advocate with the Father.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He is my High Priest—always blesses me.
He will save me to the end;
He lives to make intercession for me.
He presents me perfect before God.
Hallelujah!

4. Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He's in heaven but He's thinking of me.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
He is my High Priest full of sympathy.
I am set free before God,
Now I come boldly to the throne of grace.
All my prayers Christ offers to God.
Hallelujah!

5. 5.
6.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
It tells me all my sins are washed away.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
It tells me Abba fully accepts me.
I am perfect before God.
I am His delight as the Lord is His.
Abba loves me as He loves the Lord.
Hallelujah!

6.  Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
For me He prepares a heavenly home.
Christ my Lord ascend'd to heaven,
But He longs to take me into glory
To be His darling fore'er.
I will inherit all with the Lord.
I'll know His glory in eternity.
Halleluja

songname: SL2-90 I affect You most. You need me Most
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. You are self-existing, self-sufficient
Yet, I'm the bone of Your bones.
This is Your desire to closely join with me
In one spirit, heart to heart

2. Lord, You created me for Yourself.
Gladly You became a Man.
You suffered much and were nailed on the cross,
For You want to gain my heart.
3. For me You came from heaven to the earth.
Your love journey moves my heart.
You passed through all pain and poured out Your life
To seal this.love covenant.
4. For love You went to the mount of myrrh.
Lord, You saw the joy ahead.
You're willing to endure the bitter cross
To be in love with me.

5. For love You passed through all pain and suffring.
Lord, I have captured Your heart.
You rejoice for me, quiet me with Your love.
O' I affect You so much!
6. In Your love I have found my resting place.
Lord, I know You need me most;
I'm fore'er amazed I affect You so much!
I have captured Your heart.
7. For love You're deeply in need of me.
Without me You are in want.
Throughout the ages, across the universe,
Who could satisfy Your want?
8. You are thinking of me day and night.
Your love thoughts are more than stars.
Lord, Your fervent love draws my heart away.
Sweetly I live in Your love.

author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
1. Never shaken for-e’er the same
It’s God who justifies me.
In Christ, I will never be condemned
I am God’s righteousness

2. Never shaken, fore’er the same
Abba loves me as the Lord
The Lord loves me as Abba loves Him
Eternal highest love.

3. Never shaken, fore’er the same:
In heav’n I sit with the Lord -
Enjoy Abba’s welcome and delight
I am Abba’s dear child.

author: Tze Choi
songtext:
1. My darling, my beautiful one,
Arise and come along with me.
The winter’s past the rain’s over and gone
Flowers appear, the time of singing has come
The voice of turtle dove is heard.
The fig tree puts forth her green figs
And the vines with the tender graphs
My love, my fair one, arise and come away

2. My Beloved’s mine and I am His,
He feeds His flock amog the lilies.
Turn, my Beloved until the day breaks
And the shadows flee away, flee away.
Turn, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,
Like a young stag on the mountains of Bether.
Turn, my Beloved, be like a gazelle,
Like a young stage on the mountains of Bether.

songname: SL2-95 I will Love You, Not Be Shy
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
May my love be fervent to You.
My I pour out my love to You
I will lift up my hands. I will sing and I will dance.
I’ll joyfully proclaim: He is risen!
No more hiding, no more fear,
I don’t mind how people feel.
Leap with joy, I feel so free.
Over and over I’ll say it again:
I love You! I love You!
I will love You with my all , not be shy.

And with all my strength, I’ll tell everyone
You’re wonderful. You’re living with me
I taste Your love; You’re pleased with me -
What a happy life of love with my dear Lord!

songname: SL2-97 You will surely give me the best
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
My dear Lord, You ‘ll give me the best!
I said it not when my days were easy and light;
I said it not at the time when I gained.
What I had ever dreamed of.
When I’m in loss, when I’m in lack,
When I suffer, when I am troubled.
I can’t understand why; under pressure
I am filled with worries.
Yet I must get over all feelings.
I trust Your eternal love -
Surely You will give me the best.
I know You will never miss a single detail - 
All my hair You’ve numbered with care.
My dear Lord, You’ll give me the best!
I said it not when my days were easy and light.
I said it not at the time when I gained
What I had ever dreamed of.
When I’m in loss, when I’m in lack,
When I suffer, when I am troubled,
I can’t understand why; under pressure,
I am filled with worries.
Yet I must get over all feelings.
You make all things work for me,
Though now I may not understand
It never stops me running to Your boso.
Your love for me is proven.
I praise and give thanks to You.
I lift my hand and shout for joy.
There is nothing better You can give me,
For I’ve gained all Your heart, Your love
From everlasting to everlasting.

songname: SL2-100 This is the Day that the Lord has made
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. This is the day that the Lord has made.
We will re-joice, be glad in it.
This is the day that the Lord has made.
We will re-joice, be glad in it.

2. His mercy and lovingkindness
Are new and fresh every morning.
Love and mercy will follow me today,
And my Beloved will be with me.
3. He holds authority for me.
He causes all things work for me.
No good thing will He withhold from me.
I have a good inheritance.
4. Sufficient for the day-its own trouble.
Do not worry for tomorrow.
Enjoy every day, every stage, every step.
Enjoy, admire your whole journey.

songname: SL2-101 Father, `Twas Your Love That Knew Us
author: J. G. Deck
songtext:
1. Father, `Twas Your Love That Knew Us
Earth’s foundation long before;
That same love to Jesus drew us,
By it sweet constraining pow’r
And will keep us, and will keep us
Safely now, and ever more.
Safely now and ever more.

2. Now that changeless love enfolds us,
All its wealth on us bestows,
While it pow’r unchanging holds us
In a  holy calm repose.
O’ dear Father, O’ dear Father
Unto You our worship flows,
Unto You our worship flows.

3. Tis the Father’s tender mercy
That doth cause me to rejoice;
And myself am given wholly
As a son thro’ God’s own choice.
God so loves us! God so loves us!
That He gave us His dear Son!
That He gave us His dear Son!

4. God of love, our sols adore You1
We would still Your grace proclaim,
Till we cast our crowns before You,
And in glory praise Your name;
Praise and worship, praise and worship
Be to God and to the Lamb!
Be to God and to the Lamb!

songname: SL2-103 Gaze of Love, Ever-Active Thoughts
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Abba, You’re more real than all. You surpass all things.
You’re sitting on the throne and surrounding me.
Abba You’re closest to me. You dwell in my heart.
I treasure day and night You attend to me
From eternity past You needed me most
You earnestly desire me to be Your dearest child,
Joyfully share with me this deepest affection!
Your ever-active love and thoughts gain my heart.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. May I oft’ meditate
You’ve thought of me since eternity.
Abba, You think of me; You long for me.
O’ I have captured Your heart.

2. May I always realize
Your desire for me is long and deep.
Day and night I lean on Your bosom
I enjoy this fatherly love

3. May I enter Your love,
Talk with you face to face more and more
This is sweet moment of father and son.
We’re content in embrace of love

author: J. G. Deck
songtext:
1. Lord Jesus are we one with Thee?
O’ height, O’ depth of love!
Once slain for us upon the tree,
We’re one with Thee above

2. Our sins. Our guilt, in love divine,
All! All were borne By Thee;
The gall, the curse, the wrath were Thine,
To set Thy members free

3. Ascended now in glory bright,
Still one with us Thou art;
Nor life, nor death nor depth nor height
Thy saints and Thee can part!

4. O teach us, Lord to know and own
This wondrous mystery,
That Thou with us art truly one,
And we are one with Thee

5. Soon, soon shall come that glorious day,
When, seated on Thy throne,
Thou shalt to wond’ring worlds display
That Thou with us art one.

songname: SL2-107 The Lord's Love Dream; His Gaze of Love
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
My dear Lord, You’re above all, more real than all things.
In heav’n You live for me and You surround me;
You even live in my heart, You’re closest to me.
I treasure day and night You’re gazing on me.
I’m amazed from long ago, Your love dream was me;
In the universe, You want me to be Your dearest bride!
With You, I live a life of sweetness and beauty,
Your love thoughts are ever active toward me.

songname: SL2-108 Walk in Love with the Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. From eternity past to eternity
You desire me.
This beautiful love plan came from Your dream of love.
You want to live with me in love and joy.

2. Lord, You became a Man.
You died and shed Your blood
To betroth me.
Deeply we’re united, one spirit, heart to heart.
Forever we walk on this path of love.

3. To have you I’m so blessed.
Share with You joy and tears - 
All are precious.
Work in same heart with You, I’ll accomplish Your will
I wait for You to take me to the clouds.

songname: SL2-109 You are the conclusion of My dreams
author: Violin Chan
songtext:
You are the conclusion of my dreams!
I love You! I pursue You!
In You I have found all my dreams come true.
There’s no better story.
No other endings can be as perfect.
From the beautiful heart of Yours 
Comes this exquisite, perfect plan,
Your love, affection 
Make up all of my days.
It makes all so fair’ it makes all so sweet.
There may be tears, but joy comes at last.
What a wonderful life!
Because of You, because of Your will
I treasure my everyday.



I treasure Your calling!
You never forget Your promise.
Walk with me throughout my journey.
You are my closest friend.
My past journey was full of Your grace.
You have carried me through
The long dark valley.
No matter in north wind
Or in the south wind,
You’ve always walked with me,
Never left me. 
In my future journey
I want to walk with You.
Lord, You will keep my heart
Until the end.

author: Fo-Wo Chung
songtext:
I treasure Your calling!
You never forget Your promise.
Walk with me throughout my journey.
You are my closest friend.
My past journey was full of Your grace.
You have carried me through
The long dark valley.
No matter in north wind
Or in the south wind,
You’ve always walked with me,
Never left me. 
In my future journey
I want to walk with You.
Lord, You will keep my heart
Until the end.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. Till the Spirit is poured on us
From on high, from on high.
The desert becomes a rich field,
Which seems like a forest

2. May You pour the Holy Spirit
Upon us, upon us
The desert becomes a rich field,
Which seems like a forest.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The Father and the Son and the Spirit
Live in my heart, embrace me day and night.
I live in this sweet fellowship for-e’er.
Love, joy and life now I fully enjoy.

songname: SL2-115 The Blood of the Lamb
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. The blood of the Lamb opened a new way
To the Holy Place, Abba’s bosom.
How He loves the Lord, He loves me the same.
I am His dear child; He’s my rest.

2. The blood of the Lamb washed away my sins.
I have no shadows, whiter than snow.
He set free my heart, defeat’d all my foes.
I lift up my head, shout victory!

3. The blood of the Lamb made me righteous
The holy city, the trees of life,
All belong to me - I enthrone with Him.
In His light fore’er I abide.

songname: SL2-116 The Fruit of the Cross
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. The Lamb of God bled and died;
The veil as rent fore’er!
The wall of sins was shattered.
God took away all my sins.
I am perfect, whiter than snow. 
A living way He has opened
To the Father - I’m part of God’s circle of love!


2. I ‘ve entered God’s circle of love:
They’re always by my side - 
Sweet fellowship, love interflow,
Love of the Trinity God.
I enjoy most this fellowship:
The Father, the Son, the Spirit - 
I cherish most God’s precious name.
He’s my portion! (He’s fore’er mine)

songname: SL2-117 The Banner of the Lamb Flies over me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. The love of the Lamb has melted my heart.
He loved me and gave Himself for me.
He shed His blood to betroth me.
This life-yielding love shakes the world!

2. To gain my heart He became the Lamb
He passed  through all suff’rings for me.
On the cruel cross He overcame death
His banner over me is love

3. The wedding feast, marriage of the Lamb,
Is my sweet hope, my earnest desire.
It is His love dream, eternal yearning - 
Satisfies our hearts forever.

4. The Lamb’s glory shines in the city.
