In His love and light we’re heart to heart.
The Lamb’s enthroned in His kingdom of love.
We will reign with Him forever.

5. The steadfast love of the lamb and His bride
Is full of newness, romance and warmth.
Fore’er we live in the river of joy.
Our love will increase more and more.

6. The love of the Lamb has shaken my heart.
He loved me and gave Himself for me.
He shed His blood to betroth me.
This love has stunned the Father’s heart

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
O’ Lord I treasure You shed Your blood.
This love melts my heart, makes me amazed.
It warms my heart, draws me close to You.
I live in Your bosom of love.

O’ Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
You’ve kept the nail prints - the wounds of love
Your love’s ever fresh, forever the same.
‘Tis my eternal rest and joy

O’ Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood
Your love overcame all pain and death
We are united; I belong to You.
As a seal I am on Your heart.

O’ Lord, I treasure You shed Your blood.
Your true love for me is proven
This is my rest, the rock of my faith
I freely embrace Your love.

songname: SL2-120 And Can it be That I should gain
author: C. Wesley
songtext:
1 And can it be that I should gain
An int'rest in the Savior's blood?
Died He for me, who caused His pain?
For me, who Him to death pursued?
Amazing love! how can it be
That Thou, my God, should die for me?

Refrain:
Amazing love! how can it be
That Thou, my God, shouldst die for me!

2 He left His Father's throne above,
So free, so infinite His grace;
Emptied Himself of all but love,
And bled for Adam's helpless race;
'Tis mercy all, immense and free;
For, O my God, it found out me. [Refrain]

3 Long my imprisoned spirit lay
Fast bound in sin and nature's night;
Thine eye diffused a quick'ning ray,
I woke, the dungeon flamed with light;
My chains fell off, my heart was free;
I rose, went forth and followed Thee. [Refrain]

4 No condemnation now I dread;
Jesus, and all in Him is mine!
Alive in Him, my living Head,
And clothed in righteousness divine,
Bold I approach th'eternal throne,
And claim the crown, through Christ my own. [Refrain]

songname: SL2-122 Crown Him with many Crowns
author: M. Bridges/G. Thring
songtext:
1 Crown him with many crowns,
the Lamb upon his throne.
Hark! how the heavenly anthem drowns
all music but its own.
Awake, my soul, and sing
of him who died for thee,
and hail him as thy matchless king
through all eternity.

2 Crown him the Lord of love;
behold his hands and side,
rich wounds, yet visible above,
in beauty glorified;
no angels in the sky
can fully bear that sight,
but downward bends their burning eye
at mysteries so bright.

3 Crown him the Lord of life,
who triumphed o'er the grave,
and rose victorious in the strife
for those he came to save;
his glories now we sing
who died and rose on high,
who died eternal life to bring,
and lives that death may die.

4 Crown him the Lord of years,
the potentate of time,
creator of the rolling spheres,
ineffably sublime.
All hail, Redeemer, hail!
for thou hast died for me;
thy praise shall never, never fail
throughout eternity.

songname: SL2-124 Jesus, the very thought of Thee
author: E. Caswall
songtext:
1. Jesus, the very thought of Thee
  With sweetness fills my breast;
But sweeter far Thy face to see,
  And in Thy presence rest.

2. Nor voice can sing, nor heart can frame,
  Nor can the memory find
A sweeter sound than Thy blest Name,
  O Savior of mankind!

3. O Hope of every contrite heart,
  O Joy of all the meek,
To those who fall, how kind Thou art!
  How good to those who seek!

4. But what to those who find? Ah, this
  Nor tongue nor pen can show;
The love of Jesus, what it is
  None but His loved ones know.

5. O Jesus! light of all below!
  Thou fount of life and fire!
Surpassing all the joys we know,
  And all we can desire.

6. No other source have we but Thee,
  Soul-thirst to satisfy.
Exhaustless spring! the waters free!
  All other streams are dry.

7. Jesus, our only Joy be Thou,
  As Thou our Prize wilt be;
Jesus, be Thou our Glory now,
  And through eternity.

songname: SL2-126 Lord Jesus when we think of Thee
author: J. G. Deck
songtext:
1 Lord Jesus! when we think of Thee,
  Of all Thy love and grace,
Our spirits long and fain would see
  Thy beauty face to face.
2
And though the wilderness we tread,
  A barren, thirsty ground,
With thorns and briars overspread,
  Where foes and snares abound;
3
Yet in Thy love such depths we see,
  Our hearts o’erflow with praise—
Content ourselves, while, Lord to Thee
  A joyful song we raise.
4
Our Lord, our Life, our Rest, our Shield,
  Our Rock, our Food, our Light;
Each thought of Thee doth constant yield
  Unchanging, fresh delight.
5
Blest Savior, keep our spirit stayed,
  Hard following after Thee,
Till we, in victory displayed,
  Thy face in glory see.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
All things that happen to me in this life
Are from Your beautiful will
Either things present, or things that are to come
Cannot change Your love to me.

To be abased or to abound,
All things I face in my life
All work together to refine me
So I can finish Your will.

I have learned the secret of being filled
In the Lord I have strength
Give thanks in all things, with Him I am content
He is my fountain of joy.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Jehovah is My name forever and ever
This i my memorial to all generations
Jehovah is my name forever and ever.
This is my memorial to all generations.

I AM WHO I AM, the First and the Last
Who is, who was and who is to come, the Almighty.
Jehovah is My name forever and ever.
This is My memorial to all generations.

You should know Jehovah, He who is true
He is I AM WHO I AM, He’s from the beginning.
Jehovah is His name forever and ever.
This is His memorial to all generations.

songname: SL2-130 The wonderful eternal dance of Love
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
The eternal dance of Abba and the Lord
And the Holy spirit, wonderful and sweet!
You are boundless; You self-exist,
Overflowing with life and love.
I partake in this circle of love
What a blessing to live in this love
Let me worship Abba and the Lord
My joy is full; my heart rests, overflow
My heart rests, overflows.

songname: SL2-131 Dearest Abba, How Great You are!
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Dearest Abba, How great You are!
You once sent Your beloved Son,
And on the cross You chastised Him.
O You love me dearly!
Your gentleness and Your great love
Make me re’-lize how great You are!
You love me as You love the Lord.
How beautiful is Your heart!


Abba, who can measure Your love?
You once sent Your beloved Son,
And on the cross You chastised Him,
For You need me the most.
Your love’s boundless, Your heart’s all fair,
Make me re’lize how great You are!
You embrace me into Your heart.
And in Your love I feel so warm.
(In Your bosom my heart feels sweet.)


Dearest Abba, How great You are!
You love me as You love the Lord!
I’m born of You though created;
I am joint heir with Christ.
(You are my true ab-ba)

Your affection and Your great love
Make me re’lize how great You are.
Let me deeply enter Your love.
Love You fore’er, love You the most.

songname: SL2-133 Abba’s Personal Love for Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 My Abba’s personal love
For me is high and deep.
He would gladly send His Son
If it were only for me.

* Your love thoughts for me who can comprehend?
Now You are my dear Abba! Deep affection we share.

2 If it were only for me,
He would prepare the Lamb -
By the blood of His Son,
He washed me whiter than snow.


3 Abba, Your personal love
For me is high and deep
You forsook Your beloved Son
To gain me as Your dear child.
(I’m in Your bosom of love.)

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Wonderfully, fearfully, I was creat’d,
All things bright and beautiful, full of wonders.
My heart’s amazed and I praise my dear Abba,
How great You are! How great You are!

2 Wonderfully, fearfully, I’m born again
I am Your created one, yet born of You.
It’s so joyful to be Your dearest child.
You love me most! You love me most!
You love me as You love the Lord.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Glorious miracle of His love - 
I’m Abba’s dearest child.
This affection sweetens our hearts.
We’re enthralled in this deep love.
He brings me to His heart.

2 I am His dream, His glory.
I have captured His heart.
For me, He sings and shouts for joy.
I am His treasure, delight.
I satisfy His heart.

author: Constant Chan
songtext:
Your love is wider than the ocean
This love captures my heart.
The heavens declare Your glory 
Ever star, You call them by name.

O’ Father, Your love and tender care
Deeply comfort my heart.
Every strand of my hair You have numbered.
From afar, You know my every thought.

songname: SL2-138 I Exist Because of Abba
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 I treasure You’re my Abba
I exist because of You
Your heart and Your affection
Are reserved for Your child.
(We enjoy this affection)

2 Before time you thought of me,
Predestined me as Your child.
Your bosom and Your heart are mine.
We are enthralled in this love.

songname: SL2-139 The Tender Love and Footsteps of the Lamb
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
O my dear Lord, Your love to me is so precious.
You’re infinite; who can tell Your glory?
Yet, Lord, You came with joy, leaping upon mountains;
Became a Man, You’re born in a manger.
You chose to grow in Nazareth, a lowly town.
You’re carpenter, daily facing wood and nails.
You’ve long de-cid’d to die for me on the cross.
Lord, I treasure Your beautiful journey on earth.
O Lord, besides You to whom would I belong?

songname: SL2-140 He Came and Died for Me, Now Lives in Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
A Child was born for me, for me,
He’s the Father’s only Son.
He has no beginning, no end;
He is the infinite One.
For love, from heaven He came
To be a Man forever.
He leaped with joy upon mountains.
For me, He’s born in the manger.

2 He even walked to the cruel cross.
He saw the great joy ahead,
Endured the cross, despised the shame.
It is finished! He cried out.
He and I are in one spirit.
Fore’er He lives in my heart.
Day and night He lives with me.
O’ Lord, Your love melts my heart.

O’ Lord, Your love captures my heart.
Your banner o’er me is love.
May I follow You closely,
Forever love You only

songname: SL2-142 The Lord’s Love Dream, His Joy Ahead
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 O’ Lord, when You faced the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this fullness of joy before You.
You longed for me to be enthroned with You in glory.
You yearned to live in me forever and ever.
I cherish your love dream.
You gave Yourself for me. Now Your love dream has come true.
With joy You embrace me into Your beautiful heart.

2 O’ Lord, when you faced the deepest pain on the cross,
The joy of the Father and mine were set before You.
You longed for the Father’s deepest love to be in me.
You desired me to live in Abba’s heart forever.
I cherish Your love dream.
You gave Yourself to make Abba’s and my dream come true.
Abba ran out to me, embraced me into His heart.

3 O’ Lord, when You faced the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this fullness of joy before You.
You longed for Abba’s house of glory and unity
(To be the warmest home in the whole universe.)
(We all stand as one man to accomplish God’s love plan.)
The fullness of this house overflows to worlds of love.
I cherish Your love dream.
You offered Yourself to fulfill God’s dream of love

4 O’ Lord, when You faced the deepest pain on the cross,
You sweetly thought of this fullness of joy before You.
You longed for me to be sanctified, belong to You,
Sweetly I live with You in our fellowship of love.
(You sanctified me. Now I belong to Abba.)
(Closely I walk with Him, enjoy deepest affection)
(Live in the Father’s heart, delight in God’s family.)
I cherish Your love dream.
You gave Yourself for this wonderful love plan of God.

songname: SL2-144 When I Consider Your Love
author: Fu-Shan Ho
songtext:
1 Whenever I consider Your love,
My heart is deeply moved.
Silently You bore all agony,
Malice of sinners.
One slap after another,
One slash after another,
One nail after another,
All these pierced through Your heart.

2 My dear Lord, I think of Your wounded back.
It’s like a land being plowed.
Your head was pierced by the crown of thorn,
But You were still steadfast
You carried the bitter cross to the place called Golgotha
Heavens and earth reject’d You; Abba forsook You

3 When I behold my Lord and His cross,
How can my heart not be moved?
His head and back were wounded, hands, feet were nailed;
His side was pierced, heart broken.
Up high was my Saviour, down dripped His precious blood.
It was shed for me, to wash away my sins.

4 Whenever I think of my Lord and His cross,
My heart is melted and moved.
Such love, pain, righteousness, all weave into
Boundless forgiveness.
Love so deep, grace abundant, flowing to my heart,
Turning into a fountain, overflows forever.

5 Thinking of the tender love of the cross,
I fall in His ocean of love.
My stubborn and unyielding heart is melted.
My wounded spirit is healed.
The boundless love of the cross compels me always.
In His ocean of love I’ll be enthralled fore’er.

songname: SL2-146 The Lamb of God Loved Me and Humbled Himself
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Hark! Ten thousand voices praising,
Worthy is the Lamb, the lamb of God!
You redeemed me by Your precious blood.
Forever I will reign with You

2 The Lamb shed His blood and died for me.
The glorious young stag came with great joy,
To see my face and to hear my voice.
He wants to live with me fore’er.

3 To show me Your love, You humbled Yourself.
From heaven You came for Your love dream -
To live in me, fore’er heart to heart.
Lord, Your fervent love thrills my heart.

4 You’re God’s beloved Son, the infinite One,
But for me You were born as a Child.
You have bridged the gap and brought me into
The depth of God’s heart forever.
(God’s circle of love and joy).

songname: SL2-148 You Betrothed Me with Your Blood
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Lord, You loved me, gave Yourself on the cross.
With Your precious blood I’m betrothed to You
Death-daring love has melted my heart.
O’ Lord, Your heart and mine are united.
Heart to heart we embrace in love fore’er.

2 Facing the cross, You saw the joy ahead:
You’ll gain my heart; Your love dream will come true;
You’ll meet me in the clouds and bring me home;
Enthralled in the wedding feast of the Lamb,
We’ll drink in the endless river of love.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Were I the only sinner,
He would still come for me.
He’d endure the cross for me,
Drink the bitter cup for me
He truly loved me,
Gave Himself for me.
His boundless personal love
Thrills and melts my heart.

2 O’ my Lord’s personal love stuns the whole universe.
As a seal I’m on His heart, as a seal upon His arm.
I am my Beloved’s; He desires me
His fervent and gentle love fore’er embraces me.

3 O’ my Lord’s personal love is my myrrh, my treasure.
His eternal, fervent love forever belongs to me.
A world of two surpasses all things.
When I’m in love with my Lord,
With Him I bless the world.

O’ Lord I love You -
Draw me close to You.
Make me the closest to You,
Respond to Your love.

songname: SL2-151 YAH, the Infinite One’s Heart is Reserved for Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
You are Jehovah - I AM WHO I AM,
Infinite, most wonderful and glorious
Center everywhere, You’re overflowing;
Circumference nowhere, You are boundless and great.
How great! And holy! Who can compare with You?
Eternal! Infinite! You’re worthy of my heart.
It’s so precious Your heart is reserved for me.
I was creat’d for You. I am Your desire.
Wonderful! Beautiful is Your love to me.
I’m enthralled in this love. You hold me to Your heart.
I’m Your satisfaction, Your desire, Your love.
May You capture my heart. I am yours forever

songname: SL2-153 The Flame of Love of Jehovah
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Jehovah is my true Beloved -
Boundless, self-existing.
His whole-hearted and fervent love
Overflows to me fore’er
Indeed I’m His desire.
I’m His dearest darling.

2 Jehovah is my true Beloved - 
He is above all things.
His matchless love - so beautiful.
We’re most deeply united.
His love is my sweet rest.
His love captures my heart.

3 Jehovah is my true Beloved-
His love is wonderful.
It’s the love from the beginning-
Explained by all kinds of love.
Indeed I’m His desire.
I’m embraced by His love.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
In this world there are two hearts
Closely knit’d together.
Heart to heart, deeply in love,
There two hearts are joined as one.
He and I are one,
Deepest union.
He creat’d me for Himself
To be His darling.

songname: SL2-156 The Lord Desires and Admires Me (Song 1:8)
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 May You kiss me with kisses of Your mouth,
For Your love is better than wine.
Your oils have a pleasing fragrance.
Your name is ointment poured forth.
Lord, I love You, draw me after You.
I will run after You
Bring me into Your chambers, the secret place,
I will rejoice in You.

2 Tell me, O You whom my soul loves,
Where do You pasture Your flock,
Where do You make it lie down at noon?
I want to follow You.
Most beautiful among women,
Go forth, if you do not know,
On the trail of the flock and feed your young goats
By the tents of the shepherds.

3 Like a lily among the thorns-
My darling among maidens.
Like an apple tree in the forest-
My beloved among young men.
With great delight I sat in His shade.
His fruit was sweet to my taste.
He has brought me to His banquet hall. 

4 My Beloved is like a young stag, gazelle;
He came leaping through the mountains.
He said to me, My beautiful one,
Arise! Come along with Me.
Winter is past, the rain is gone,
Flowers appear on the earth.
The voice of the turtledove is heard.
Arise! Come along with Me.


5 Let Me see your face and hear your voice
In the secret place of the cliff.
Let Me see your face and hear your voice
In the clefts of the rock.
For your voice is sweet to me,
And your face is lovely.
You’re my treasure, I desire you forever.
Day and night I long for you.

6 O My darling, You’re so beautiful.
There is no blemish in you.
You have made My heart beat faster
With a glance of your eyes.
How much better is your love than wine,
And the fragrance of your oils.
A strand of your necklace steals My heart.
How beautiful is your love.

7 A garden enclosed is My sister,
A spring shut up a fountain sealed.
You’re a garden spring, well of fresh waters,
And streams from Lebanon.
Awake, north wind, and come, O south,
Blow upon my garden,
That the spices may blow out from my garden
Come, my Beloved, eat its fruits.

8 My sister, My love, My perfect one,
May you open for Me,
For My head is covered with dew,
My locks the drops of the night.
Though you are weak, I know your hardship.
My love to you will not change.
You’re My beloved darling. I desire you.
Quickly fly to My bosom. (I am the resurrection.)

9 The one who looks forth as the morning,
Fair as the moon, clear as the sun,
Awesome as an army with banners
Is My beautiful one!
You are lovely as Jerusalem,
As beautiful as Tirzah,
Awesome as an army with banners.
All day you capture My heart.
Turn your eyes away from Me,
For they have overcome Me.
You are My dove, My love, My perfect one,
The only one in My heart.

10 O My beloved, from feet to head,
You’re beautiful, lovely, glorious.
The hair of your head is like purple
I’m captured by your tresses.
O My love, how beautiful
And how delightful you are.
Let’s embrace forever, heart to heart.
I always desire you!

11 Set me as a seal upon Your heart,
Like a seal upon Your arm.
For Your love is as strong as death,
Jealousy as cruel as Sheol.
Its flashes are flashes of fire,
It’s the flame of Jehovah.
Waters, great waters cannot quench love.
Nothing can exchange for it.
O, Lord, Your love has melted my heart;
I’m captured and drawn away.
I am enthralled in Your love embrace,
Live in the depth of Your heart.
Fully respond to your love;
Fall in love with You fore’er.

songname: SL2-162 He Desires Me and Delights in Me the Most
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Your love to me is wholehearted,
Infinitely personal.
You have reserved Your heart for me.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.

2 You’ll embrace me forever
With Your love from beginning.
Death-daring love shakes heav’n and earth.
Now I know you delight in me
Now I know Your desire for me.

3 You’ve longed to live in my heart,
To unite with me forev’r.
We are in love; live together.
Now I know You delight in me.
Now I know Your desire for me.

4 For you and me, you have designed
An eternal plan of love
We have the same beautiful dream.
Now I know you delight in me
Now I know Your desire for me.

author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
By You, the best is now,
For You’re better than all.
I’m not ashamed when I rely on You
By You I will rejoice.
I once believed
The past’s better than now.
And I forgot You are with me now.
Your love is surrounding me.
You’re loving me, embracing me.
Your love has never changed.
For You are better than all,
By You the best is now.

songname: SL2-165 He chose Me. He Loves Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Lord, I am moved, You’ve chosen me.
Your personal love to me!
I am Your chosen vessel.
May I closely cowork with You
Serve in this age by Your purpose
Finish Your will with great glory

2 Among thousands, Lord, You chose me,
Gave me this great commission.
Your wonderful, personal love
Touches my heart, captures my heart.

3 Lord, what can I render to You?
I’ll follow You to the end.
I’ll live for You, strive to the end,
Sing all the way, love You only

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Rejoice we’ll meet the Lord in the clouds.
Our bodies will be transformed like HIs
I will be with Him, share His glory,
Ever in Abba’s house.

2 Glorious rewards before stage of Christ!
Jubilant wedding feast of the Lamb!
Reign with the Lord in Millennium
Joint-heir with Christ fore’er!

songname: SL2-167 Same with Me in All Things
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Lord, for Your love for me,
Your eternal exquisite love,
You longed to be a Man,
Same with me in all things.
You want to take away
All the distance and fear
You chose to come for me
To taste the life of a man.
Lord, You comfort’d my heart,
Healed me and filled me with gladness.
Lord, You want to be with me,
To live closest with me.

2 Lord, for Your love for me,
Your eternal, exquisite love,
You longed to be a Man,
Forever live in me.
Your leaped o’er the mountains.
You saw the great joy ahead.
You despised all the shame,
Endured the pain on the cross.
Now we are joined as one.
You are my Beloved forever.
I am Your dearest darling.
Fore’er we live in love.

For-ever and ever
We relish this deepest love.
You love me; I love You,
Heart to heart forever
Enjoy eternal love.

songname: SL2-169 His Zealous Heart to Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Lord, You are God, dwelling in the light which no man
Can come near. Yet You long for me.
For Your love dream, You came from heaven to the earth,
Became a Man, to draw near to me.
The Great I AM, with no beginning and no end;
And yet for me, and You are a Man forever.
Because of me, You treasure to be God and Man
I am amazed, Lord, You’re no longer God only.

2 Fore’er a Man, You deeply comfort my heart
Fore’er Man You explain Your great love
I am amazed, O’ Lord I affect You so much.
For Your desire, You’re a Man forever.
Fore’er a Man, You’re glad to give yourself for me.
Fore’er a Man, You’ve proved Your love to me.
Fore’er a Man, You’ve declared Your full commitment.
You gladly kept the wounds of love on Your body
To confirm Your love and desire for me.
O’ Lord, Your love moves me and captures my heart.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
You are a Man forever.
You live with me from morn to night
I’m not Your obligation.
But I’m Your love dream indeed,
Your yearning from eternity,
Your joy a head, Your joy fore’er.
Lord, I’m thrilled by Your love for me.
Let me respond to You always.
Lord, Your contentment let me be.
Forever we are heart to heart.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Your choice of love moves me deeply.
You set Your love on me forever.
You chose to be a Man forever.
Your choice made You go onto the cross.
Now I live in union with You.
With greatest joy You live in me.
You chose me to be Your first love.
I share Your all forever more

2 Your choice of love moves me deeply
You set Your love on me forever.
I’m Your love dream since eternity
You chose to be a Man forever.
You are fully committed to me,
Involve Yourself eternally.
You and I dwell in deepest union.
We become one - how warm and sweet

3 I shall love you with all my heart,
Lay aside all and overcome all
I shall love You, follow You fore’er
Apart from You, all are vanities.
I’m Your first love now and forever.
You’ll be with me eternally.
O’ Lord, may I love You only,
Follow closely, till I see Your face.

4 It is Your choice to love me fore’er.
Your flame of love has overcome all.
You’re overjoyed to live in me,
Set Your banner of love on me.
O’ Lord, Your love, Your glorious life,
Your heart, Your all forever are mine.
There’ll be endless discoveries.
In Your boundless ocean of love

songname: SL2-174 Gladly sit in Heaven with the Lord
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
In heav’n I sit with You.
How precious t’is my place,
Forever sure!
It’s sweet to stay before
Abba’s and Your countenance.
Now through eternity we’ll never part.
In heaven live with You, abide in love.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Though You’re in heaven high,
I am on earth below,
You’re in my heart.
I’m joined to You as one,
Fore’er in one spirit.
I am Yours; You are mine. We’re heart to heart.

2 Though You’re in heaven high,
You are closest to me - in on spirit.
You’ve made a home in me. Gladly I live in You.
Love interflow with You - O’ such sweet bliss!
Living with you feels like spring every day.

3 Though You’re in heaven high,
I am on earth below, we’re joined as one.
No distance, no hindrance, we share the closest tie.
I’ll never be lonely in this union.
We’re lovers, hand in hand in unison.

songname: SL2-177 Our Three Stages - Take up the Task, Finish His Will
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1947-1997
1 Lord, I treasure this glorious first stage
Your task I took, foundation was laid.
You carried me from Gui-zhou to Hong Kong
And in this place, I was gloriously saved.
I’m captured by Your love appearing
Your love’s so sweet, more than words can tell.
You called, You chose, You commissioned me
To build the church after Your own heart
Lord, I thank You for your love and grace.
Your love for me moved and melt’d my heart.


1968-1997

2 Lord, You defeat’d the pow’r of darkness
From a village, You raised this movement
I can’t forget vision of the church,
Your great presence, glorious revivals.
You carried me through storms and fires.
Lord, by Your grace, I have conquered all.
Lord, You sent Your loved ones to all lands
To build the church after Your own heart.
This precious stage, no-thing can replace.

1997-2013

3 You guid’d our way to the second stage,
You covered our wings with silver.
Lord, You disclosed Your heart of Beloved,
And You declared the Father’s sweet name,
Rebuilt David’s tabernacle - 
Worship and sing to You and Abba.
You led us to life eternal.
Thank You, my Lord, for Your tender love.
This precious stage nothing can replace.

2013-the Lord’s coming

4 We walk with joy on the third stage,
Run together this final journey.
We’re heart to heart, build the church He desires,
Fulfill His dream, complete the Lord’s will.
He will come back to receive His bride
To live with Him sweet eternity.
O’ Lord, keep me till I see Your face.

5 Brothers, sisters, arise with joy.
May you walk on this glorious journey:
Live out His will, with Abba and the Lord,
March on with Him and fight the good fight.
Let’s offer Him what He’s long desired.
For Him, we’ll write the glorious last page.
With our dear Lord, we’ll make sweet memories.

songname: SL2-182 March Forward to a Glorious Journey
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 I have a dream - heav’nly vision
Others have doubts, envy and disbelief.
Through the long, dark valley
He lit up my path
He set me free from the dark dungeon
We prosper in the land of affliction.
Glory and joy wipe away all our tears.
Hi dream and mine, glorious commission!
We will never forget!

2 He is the first; He is the last.
He gives me faith; He’ll take care till the end.
I overflow with hope,
Singing all the way,
Same mind with Him, anchor the race of faith
‘Tis His glorious commission of this age.
What an honour to closely follow HIm!
Through suffering enter glory
Lovfully I’ll finish His will

3  Long, dark valley is over.
He will stretch out His mighty arm for us!
We passed through floods and fires
To the fruitful land
Valleys of tears turned into springs of joy.
We prosper in the land of affliction
Glory and joy wipe away all our tears.

His dream and mine, glorious commission,
Will soon be accomplished.
Glory and joy ever increasing
Until we meet one day in the cloud
The vict’ry won, my Lord, You will come!
O’ my Beloved, may You come quickly!

songname: SL2-185 The Day the Lord Will Crown Me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
When I think of the day the Lord will crown me,
Many rewards I’ll gain at Stage of Christ.
Light affliction is for me glory
Eternal, far beyond compare.
My heart’s lightened, from strength to strength.
My labour in the Lord’s not in vain.

Now I am strong; my heart’s gladdened.
You understand; You admire me.
Y burden’s light, i can smile again.
To live for You - not in vain.
My rewards I desire to gain,
Despise all trials, run the race ahead.
Striving forward, press on toward the goal
See the clouds in the sky. Hear now heaven’s applause.
I will pour out all my life for the Lord.
Strive till I rest in His bosom
Or see Him face to face in the clouds.
No more tears, nor death, nor sorrow, nor crying.
What price-less treasure to live for the lord
Sweet memories last forever
What a joy to lay my crowns before Your feet.
Render my all to You for Your ture love.
For Your most amazing love to me.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Face to face, face to face,
Your love dream comes true!
Face to face, face to face,
Our hearts satisfied!
Face to face, together
We’ll live forever!
Face to face, we will share
Love eternity!
Sweet eternity!

songname: SL2-188 I am Your Sweet Love Dream
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
From everlasting to everlasting,
I’m Your deepest desire, Sweet dream of love
For me You became a man forever
You gladly chose to be the Son of Man
Lord, for me You were hung on the tree
O’ Your love for me stuns the universe.
You longed to closely unite with me.
Hand in hand we walk on this path of love

Together we will share this love eternity
I am your first love, eternal love.
I’ve captured Your heart; You love me fore’er

Please quickly return, O’ my Beloved.
Full of romance we’ll meet in the clouds.
Fly to the place You have prepared for me.
Fly to the place You have prepared for us.
New Jerusalem! New Jerusalem!

songname: SL2-190 You make the Impossible Possible
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 You are God; I am man
You’re in Heav’n; I’m on earth
You create; I was creat’d
You’re boundless; I’m triv’al

But You and I are deeply united
How can it be possible?
It is far beyond all the dreams  but You can do all things.
The impossible You make it possible!

2 You have all; I have lack
You are strong; I am weak.
You’re eternal, I’m temporal
You’re Holy; I was wicked

For love You broke through the impossible
Bridging the gap, You shattered all walls.
For me You crossed the deep, You’re the Way to heaven
Between heaven and earth there’s no more distance.


3 Tenderly You told me
It’s for You I was creat’d
I’m the core of Your love dream.
For me You’re a Man for-e’er

Lord, You whisper words, of love in my ears:
I’m Your desire from from eternity
For me You gave up Your all. You deposed all the shames
NowI be long to You forever

4 Great distance between us,
Yet we can be closest.
In Your image, I was creat’d
I can be most like You

O’ Lord, You came to be the same with me
You shed Your blood to re-deem me.
Now we are deeply united in one spirit forever
Compatible to You, I’m Your sweet darling

5 I am Your bone of bones
I am Your greatest treasure
In this world through all ages
Only You are my Beloved
I am Your dearest darling forever
And now I am born of the Spirit
I become the partaker of Your divine nature
Forever You will live in my heart

6 You give me gifts of love - 
Beautiful flowers flowers
To tell me Your great love
And kiss me with kisses.
All these confirmed me Your love is real
Your beautiful life journey on earth 
All the flowers on earth, the rainbow in heaven
She shed Your blood to zeal this love covenant.

7 Proof of love, beautiful!
You’re in me forever
Your love dream has come true
You and I are joint as one

Hallelujah! You have accomplished this
Wonderful love in the universe
The love dream of the Trinity has forever come true
You and I walk on the endless path of love
Drink from the river of love forever

songname: SL2-194 Flaming Love of the Cross
author: Sermon Lo
songtext:
1 Behold! The sun gave not its light,
The earth shook, covered with darkness
God’s beloved Son was forsaken
He tasted death for me.

2 Hung on the cross, my lonely Lord,
Received no sympathy.
Man’s mockery pierced through his Heart
For me, He was despised.

3 Covered with blood and wounds, my Lord
He paid the ransom for me
He loved me, gave Himself for me
He bled and died for me

He loved me, gave Himself for me
He bled and died for me.

songname: SL2-195 How the Father Felt when He swore the Oath
author: Rachel Cheung
songtext:
When You appointed Your Son as High Priest,
You foresaw_ the sce^ne Your oath would bring
Your^ Son, being whipped, nailed and hung on high;
His death_ - crueler than hell!
Then You heard His cry that finally came,
Words that pierced_ through Your alrea_dy broken heart:
My God, My God, why have You forsaken Me?
These words devastated Your heart!
Such a sight, such emotions when You swore,
Yet You never wavered nor did_ You hesitate.
Scenes flashed past, one by one, stu_nning Your_ heart;
Yet Your fer_vour blazed ever strong!
O the zeal of Yahweh will this perform!
Even when pa_ssing through depthless agony!
You will never relent nor_ will You delay;
And the oath You've made shows Your determined heart!



v1

Appointing Your Son to be the High Priest,
You foresaw the scene your oath would bring
Your beloved Son would be whipped, nailed and hung
He would taste death crueler than hell!
Then you heard you son finally came,
His words that pierced through Your broken heart
My God, My God, why have You forsaken Me?
These words torn apart Your heart!
You foresaw this when You took the oath,
Yet You never wavered nor did you hesitate
Scene flashed past, one by one, striking Your heart;
Yet Your fervour blazed ever strong
The zeal of Jehovah will this perform!
Even when passing through depthless agony!
You will never relent nor will You delay;
And the oath You took showed Your determined heart!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Behold He came leaping over mountains.
He longed to see my face, and to hear my voice
O’ Lord, how many mountains You’ve climbed?
How much pain You’ve gone through?
O’ how deep is Your desire for me?
From heaven to the earth You came for me.
You became a Man in flesh and blood.
Lord, You took the form of a slave.
For me You bore the bitter cross.

2 O’ Lord, to see my face and hear my voice
Whispering, I love You to be unit’d with me,
You came leaping over mountains
Breaking all the distance!
Forever we are one, heart to heart
With rapt’rous joy You came into my heart,
And lead me into the depth of Your heart.
You bring me to Your glorious throne.
I share Your all, live in sweet love with You.
Through all eternity.

songname: SL2-199 The most beautiful love dream
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Your beautiful love from the beginning
Was set on me from eternity
It’s Your deepest secret hidden in Your heart,
Your sweet love dream, longing
For You and me, You have a stunning love plan.
You have seen the joy ahead.
For Your love dream You came gladly as a Man
And You despised all the shame.
Lord, You loved me; You gave Yourself for me
Your death-daring love shakes God’s heart and mine.
You betrothed me with Your precious blood.
We’re one spirit forever.
You live in me, and I live in You.
We’re heart to heart, I’m Yours and You are mine.
I’ve gained the most beautiful love in this world.
I have captured Your heart.
Now and forever, full of warmth and romance
We will walk on this path of love.
In this matchless beauty, warmth and love
I’ll wait for Your return.
You long to carry me home.
Then we’ll enter the eternity of love!
O’ Lord Jesus, may you return!

songname: SL2-201 The Love that Stun my Heart
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Heaven and earth tell me of Your love
Without a word, yet declare Your deep love,
Reveal Your love, glory, beauty
So softly, in harmony.
You gladly came from heav’n to earth.
To come close to me, You became a Man
You sought me, saved me from all miseries,
Put me on Your shoulder, set me on Your heart
Your love is flashes of fire, perfect from the beginning.
Your love journey moves my heart. How beautiful-- Your footsteps!
Your unreserved love for me was proven on the cross
With your pieced side, Your many wounds.

2 Love unto death shakes heavens and earth
It stuns my heart; I’m conquered by Your love.
Banner of love flies over me.
I am Yours. You have gained my heart.
The song of songs is Your love song.
Telling me of Your deepest love for me.
My Lord, You save me by Your precious blood,
Betrothed me to be Your darling forever.
I’m Your creation of love, I exist because of You
Since eternity past, You’ve been thinking about me.
Your love story has been told from creation till today.
Your proof of love is everywhere.

O’ Lord I want to know more Your forever loving heart,
The fullness of creation, Your love journey on earth,
Profound knowledge of the cross, Your desire for me today,
Your eternal sweet dream of love.
O’ Lord, may I live in the depth of Your loving heart,
Be Your dearest, perfect darling!

songname: SL2-204 I am for You; Your heart is reserved for me
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Lord, You are self-hidden, gentle, loving
You are mindful of my mortal frame.
Yet Your love to me is eternal and boundless
For love You’re willing to be a Man for-e’er
I have not yet seen Your dazzling glory
I cannot fully know your matchless love,
Cannot fully contain Your boundless flaming love,
Cannot stand Your overwhelming reaction. 

2 Though my heart can’t fully contain your love
In You is hidden the richest love
This rich love flows to me and belongs to me
You are humble, gentle, friendly and close to me
Living with you day and night, now and forever,
I have sweetness, comfort, joy, peace.
You veil Your flaming love when You gently come to me,
When You appear to me in sweetness and love.

3 The Lamb who once was slain, glorious young stag -
It’s You - the boundless glorious Lord!
This symbol of love melts and captures my heart.
I look forward to having the glorious body.
Then I’ll be able to see more of Your glory
I will know more, enjoy more of Your love
Now I still can’t contain, cannot fully comprehend
Your boundless, endless and deepest love.

4 Who can measure how deep is Your love, Lord?
Yet this love burns and outflows from Your heart.
This eternal, undying, burning love of Yours
Is my treasure, belongs to me now and fore’er.
Your heart burning with Your flaming love
Softly, tenderly comes close to me.
With Your gentleness You cloak Your flaming love.
Now I live with You in freedom and joy.

5 Though You’ll enlighten me unceasingly,
I still can’t fully comprehend Your love.
Forever I cherish Your loving heart for me.
The boundless You forever belong to me.
You deeply enjoy my love; I enjoy Yours.
I exist to be the dearest to You.
Forever You reserve all Your love for me
It’s so precious I have captured Your whole heart.

songname: SL2-207 The Glorious Lord of Life
author: Daniel Yu
translate: Alison Chan, New York Music Team
songtext:
Who would have envisioned the bleak and barren tress
Can blossom with such beautiful flowers,
Cov’ring branches with stunning colours
O’ the resurrection pow’r
O’ the infinite power of life.

Flowers blooming with smiles celebrate You’re risen.
You raised me up together with You
You have become my glorious life.
As you live, so I will also live.

In You, my Lord, there’s no dead-end.
But only man’s unbelief.
Once I was dead, but You raised me up.
Fore’er I’m Your glorious new creation

I am Your dearest darling, Your beautiful lily
God’s seed abides in my heart forever
I partake in His divine nature.
Much more, Lord, You abide in my heart.
You make my life shine with glory,
Singing with sweet melodies.
You bring my heart into beautiful spring.
Lord, in Your love I am forever young

In this cold and dark world there may be pain and grief.
Yet, by Your love I see beyond dark clouds.
My heart’s gladdened, nourished and sweetened
Tender love wipes away all my tears.
Lord, in Your love, my path is bright
I leap with joy like rising sun.
Live in your love, we walk hand in hand
On this glorious and brilliant path of faith

When I am left without hope, Lord, You will give me hope.
O’ my dear Lord, with You I’ll march forward.
Then I will fly to Your bosom.
You’ll meet me with Your embrace,
Your embrace of love, Your smiling face.

songname: SL2-211 May You see the Good of the Church All Your life
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 For all your life may you see the good of the church.
Be root’d in God’s house-hold
Flourish in the church
May they prosper who love You,
O’ those who love the church.
O’ may the Lord bless you from His household

2 For all your life may you see the good of the church
O’ God’s abode of rest is also my rest.
If I forget you, O’ church, let me utter no word.
God’s most glorious purpose in my vision.

3 The church is God’s purpose, the hope of the world.
God’s most glorious purpose is my meaning of life.
The Lord has sent His church to accomplish His will.
May you desire the church for all your life,
Build His church, live out God’s family.

songname: SL2-213 I Trust! I Hope! I Love!
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Lord, with your love, with Your presence,
I trust! I hope! I love!
I will rise above storms and waves, distress, and sickness,
Slanders, tribulations, come what may!
I trust! I hope! I love!
I fight the good fight by Your grace.
My heart’s radiant; sing all the way.
I trust! I hope! I love!
May I offer my forever burning heart!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1 Come to me, come to me
I miss you so much!
Come to me, come to me,
How I long for you!
Come to me, come to me.
I’m your all, your life.
Come to me, come to me,
I’m your sweet portion,
Let’s embrace in love!

2 Fly to him, fly to him, He misses you so much!
Fly to him, fly to him, How he longs for you!
Fly to Him, fly to Him, He’s your all, your life.
Fly to Him, fly to HIm, He’s your sweet portion
Embrace Him in love!

songname: SL2-215 The Beautiful Reasons to Smile
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Smile, the Love loves me most
Smile, He rules over all.
Smile, He causes all things to work together.
Smile, the Lord desires me.
Smile, He’s thinking of me
Smile, He is my all longing
Dearest true Beloved.

songname: SL2-216 Smile for the Lord’s Personal Love and Commission
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
Smile, His love to me is personal
Smile, for He commissioned me.
Smile, we are forever joined together
In one spirit

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
My Abba stretches out His hands, invites me gladly to join
The most joyous holy Trinity’s eternal dance of love
Such joy’s beyond all dreams! Such love’s above all thoughts!
I’m embraced in your warmest circle of love. My bliss and joy overflow.

Abba, You stretch out Your hands, invites me gladly to join
With You, the Lord and the Spirit, Your eternal dance of love
Such joy’s beyond all dreams! Such love’s above all thoughts!
I now enter Your circle of love. My bliss and joy overflow

Into your fellowship of joy, I’m embraced with tender love.
As I join in Your dance of love, my bliss and joy overflow.
Such joy’s beyond all dreams! Such love’s above all thoughts!
Most blessed am I in the universe. I’m treasured in the depth of Your heart!

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
1. More than fearfully created, I was born again of God
Now my life is joined to His life, such love bond satisfies me,
Born of God! Wonderful! Born of God Wonderful!
He’s my true eternal Abba! I’m His darling child, His joy!

2. Such love’s miracle amazes me, manifest Your love and pow’r
O such deepest tie and love bond satisfies Your heart and mine
Born of God! Wonderful! Born of God Wonderful!
I’m the fellow heir with Jesus; I’ll inherit all with Christ,
Reign with Him forever more. Wonderful! Wonderful!

songname: GBH-06 Who Affects the Father Most
author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
I am amazed I affect You most!
You’ve thought of me from eternity past.
For me, You sent Your beloved Son from Heaven,
And He gave Himself for me on the cross.
Father, Your beautiful heart
Was pierced through with arrows!
O glorious! The Lord cried out,
“It is finished!”
The veil was rent; You ran to me,
Embraced me to Your heart, covered me with kisses,
Rested on my neck; You’re overjoyed!
Your love dream’s gloriously fulfilled!
La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La La
You prepared a rich feast; You sang and danced!
You shouted for joy over me. Your heart was filled;
Embracing me, You’re ravished in love!
I am amazed: infinite You are,
Out of love, You need me most!
Yearning for me to be close to You,
Hand in hand You and I live in love.

author: Daniel Yu
songtext:
A father of the fatherless, a defender of widows
Is God in His holy dwelling, looking after the helpless
God makes the lonely ones to live in a home of love
God makes the lonely ones to live in His warm family
From eternity He desire me to be His bosom darling child!

No He’s my dearest Abba, my eternal Father!
O I’m His joy, His darling child, fellow heir with Christ forever
As He loves His beloved Son, He loves me with the highest love!
I can face the word with Abba, rejoice daily in His love
I can dance and shout for victory, sweetly rest in His bosom!

Now you’re my dearest Abba, my eternal Father!
O I’m Your joy, Your darling child, fellow heir with Christ forever.
As you love Your beloved Son, You love me with the highest love!
I can face the world with You Abba, rejoice daily in Your love.
I can dance and shout for victory, sweetly rest in Your bosom!

有一位神，有权能创造宇宙万物
也有温柔双手安慰受伤的灵魂；
有一位神，有权柄审判一切罪恶，
也有慈悲体贴人的软弱。
有一位神，我们的神，
唯一的神，名叫耶和华，
有权威荣光，有恩典慈爱，
是昔在今在永在的神。

有一位神，有权能创造宇宙万物
也有温柔双手安慰受伤的灵魂；
有一位神，高坐在荣耀的宝座，
却死在十架挽救人堕落。
有一位神，我们的神，
唯一的神，名叫耶和华，
有权威荣光，有恩典慈爱，
是昔在今在永在的神。x2

他是唯一的神，名叫耶和华
有权威荣光，有恩典慈爱，
是昔在今在永在的神，
他有权威荣光，他有恩典慈爱，
他是昔在今在永在的神。

祢的身体为我而舍 
带我出黑暗进入光明国度 
使我再次能看见

主耶稣我感谢祢 
祢的宝血为我而流 
宝贵十架上医治恩典涌流 
使我完全得自由 

宝贵十架的大能赐我生命 
主耶稣我俯伏敬拜祢 
宝贵十架的救恩 
是祢所立的约 

祢的爱永远不会改变

songname: The Love of Father, Son, Spirit
author: Fish
songtext:
1. You are the living God, forevermore
Of wonder and glory
"I am that I am"
Mid the Father, the Son,, And the Holy Spirit
There's interflow of love Before time began

2. The Father and the Son and the Spirit,
Sweet and perfect in one, love boundless and deep
Now I can partake such closest tie and love,
Drink from the highest love, my heart rests in peace

3. O God, the First the Last,
Great your glory!
Yet you have thought of me since eternity
How precious are Your thoughts
They outnumber the sand
Or the starts of heaven, All with love for me

4. Through all eternity, You're loving me,
Long that I'm joined to You,
E;er in love abide.
Lord, You are my beloved;
Your heart, your arm are mine,
Sharing Your everything With me You desire.

author: Fish
songtext:
1. Before time began was salvation grace
    Given to me in Christ Jesus.
    From e erlasting, He ve thought of me
    Such love draws me, comforts my soul

2. What length, breadth, height and depth, Lord is Your Love!
Give me warmth, melts my heart each passing hour
My soul adores, flows endless praise
Your bads of love draws me to You

songname: He Came From Heaven To Earth
author: Fish
songtext:
1. God's beloved Son came from heaven to earth
His name is Jesus, 
Dwelt among men with glory,
Full of grace, full of truth.
From heaven to earth He came to bring me
Back to the Father's fold

2. God's beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
Was in a manger born.
He bore all sorrows for me.
He walked to the cross for me.
God's beloved Son came from heaven to earth;
He gave Himself for me

3. God's beloved son came from heaven to earth,
To fight battles for me.
Destroyed the works of Satan,
He took away all my sins.
From heaven to earth HE came to bring me
Out of death into life.

4. God's beloved Son came from heaven to earth,
Forever He is man.
He is so kind and friendly. 
What love and warmth He gives me!
God's beloved Son came from heaven to earth, 
His great love melts my heart.

songname: The Love Song of Heaven And Earth
author: TBD
songtext:
Gazes upon the earth, the heav'n above,
Yet the earth has never cared.
But to-day, dear Lord, it's so different now,
Thru' heaven and earth Your love is shown.
Looking up, run my tear, 'cause You've once left there,
And now again You are there.
Why should the heaven bow to kiss the earth?
Why should it shelter the earth?
If you were the clouds up high,
I could only be a small grass down on earth.
Yet the clouds turn to rain, showering down,
To nourish my whole life.
Never dared I to dream of the things a-bove,
But to-day i am seated in heaven with you.
“Tis too good to be true, yet this message from You,
Is the best that’s ever come true.

author: TBD
songtext:
From heaven, Lord, you came.
It makes me so amazed.
You were mocked and despised,
Yet Your love was still the same.
E’en Your brother’s sneers could not quench Your love,
Men’s in-difference showed more Your love of endurance.
The world forsook You, and cried, “A-way with Him!”
You were steadfast, walked to Cal-va-ry!
Wondrous cross! Wondrous Cross!
Vast forgiveness and bountiful grace flowing from the cross!
Love as flashes of fire, as the flame of God!
Your fervent love to men makes me ev-er
Amazed, a-dore!

author: TBD
songtext:
Lord Jesus, You suffered so much for me.
Once you poured out Your life freely for me;
Walked up to Golgo-tha, You were hung on the tree,
Blood and wa-ter came out, all for me.

2. Lord Jesus, You suffered so much for me.
For me You bore those stripes on your body;
You are God, yet for me, were despised by the world.
That I might gain You. Thank You, Lord.

3. O Lord Jesus, whom my soul loves!
Now and ev-er, YOu abide in my heart;
Precious in-dwell-ing, un-ion forev-er!
Nothing can keep YOu and me A-part.

4. Storms and waves may come to me all the way,
But all these just urge me to draw near You;
Lord, i’m glad to abide in Your bosom of love,
And respond to You with all my life.

author: TBD
songtext:
Not that I loved the lord Jesus,
But He has loved me first,
Dying for me on Cal-va-ry,
Bearing all my sins for me.

2. My Lord’s love is as strong as death,
Fervent as burning flame.
Waters, great waters cannot quench;
All treasures cannot replace.

songname: The Loving Course Of Jesus-The Crucifixion
author: TBD
songtext:
“Away with Him!” cried men on earth.
They cast the Lord out of the gate.
Wounded He bore the cross for me, 
To Golgo-tha bled all the way.

2. Though He was rich; He became poor.
Even His clothes cast lots they took.
All through his life, weary and sore,
In manager born, died on the cross.

3. His hands were nailed; His feet were pierced,
Hung on the tree, dreadfully cursed.
His blood flowed down, bones could be counted,
Tongue cleaved to jaws, heart melted like wax.

4. Fountain of Life’ said, “I’m thirsty.”
From lake of fire, He did save me.
God’s beloved Son, by God forsaken.
Lonely, He tasted death for me.

5. His face was marred, and He was crushed.
Bloody and scarred, within and without.
The precious veil is rent for me.
A living way to god He leads me.

author: TBD
songtext:
How I thank You, dear Lord!
You came to die for me.
You shed Your blood; Hands, feet were pierced,
To save a wretch like me.

2. Moved deeply by this love,
Eyes brimmed with tears I bow.
O Son of God, how can it be
That You should die for my sins!

3. Saved from eternal death,
Set free from pow’r of sin,
Led into the marvelous light,
E’er into the marvelous light,
E’er in God’s kingdom I live.

songname: It’s You Who Have loved Me, My Lord!
author: TBD
Fish
songtext:
1. O the cross of Golgo-tha
Tells the love of my Savior, how deep!
Down from heaven full of wealth and glory,
You did come, shed Your blood for me.
Foxes have holes, even birds of the air have nests,
Yet You had no place to lay Your head.

2. O the cross of Golgotha
Tells the love of my Savior, how rich!
Suffered all the shame and scoffs so sorely,
Gave Yourself, bore the stripes for me,
The crown of thorns, the wounded hands and feet and side -
I am set free by Your sacrifice.

* Think and think - O Lord, Your love un-dying!
Ne'er its depth can I realize
Gazing up-on the cross - Your arms are open wide
May I come and consecrate my life.
